1Yesu lɛ lɔɔrɔ na sʊkpar kʊrɔ a nɩbɛ na wʊ 'yɛrɛ, 2“A Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ nyɛntãan fɩka nãa kɔ̃ɔ na maal a wʊ bidaba na kulo pɔɔ paalaa bʊ̃diir. 3Wʊ tʊ̃n a wʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ ɩka ba tɩ 'yɛr a bala wʊn bʊɔl a pɔɔ paalaa jie, tɩchɛ a bala wʊn bʊɔl ka ba tɔr.
4“Wʊ lɛ tʊ̃n nɩyor ɩka ba tɩ 'yɛr a bala wʊn bʊɔl, ‘Nyɛ, n maal a pɔɔ paalaa bʊ̃diir baar, n kʊn a n nadar nɩ a napɔl ka yele jaa chɔɔr baar, yɩ wa a pɔɔ paalaa jie.’
5“Tɩchɛ ka ba tɔr ka nyã jaa ma chen wʊ chenfʊ jie, ka ãsʊɔ mɩ chen a wʊ puo pɔ, ka ãsʊɔ mɩ chen a wʊ yar jie. 6Tɩchɛ ka a bala na chɛ nyɔɔr a wʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ ge ba tɩ na ba kʊ ba. 7A nãa suur ir naa ka wʊ tʊ̃ a wʊ sojasɩ ɩka ba tɩ kʊ a nɩkʊrbɔ bala tɩ chʊm a ba tẽe.
8“Tɩ na wʊ pãa 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ, ‘Yele jaa chɔɔr baar, tɩchɛ a bala ɩn bʊɔl ba sɛɛ ɛ. 9Yɩ yi a tẽe pɔ tɩ bʊɔl nɩrɛ jaa yɩn nyɛ ka wʊ wa a pɔɔ paalaa jie.’ 10Lɛ lɛ, a tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ yin a tẽe pɔ tɩ bʊɔl nɩrɛ jaa ban nyɛ, a nɩmɩn nɩ a nɩdɛbɛ ka a yir wa sɛɛn nɩbɛ wʊ jaa.
11“Tɩchɛ a nãa na wa kpɛ ɩka wʊ kaa a nɩbɛ, wʊ nyɛn daba ãsʊɔ na ba su a pɔɔbɩɛl fuu ɛ, 12Ka wʊ suur wʊ, ‘N badaba, ŋmɩnɛ fʊ ɩrɛ wa kpɛ a ka tɩ ba su a pɔɔ paalaa fuu ɛ?’ Ka a daba kpal a nɛɛ.
13“Ka a nãa 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ, ‘Yɩ lũ a wʊ gbɛɛ naa nuur na yɩ lɔb wʊ bar yõo a libe pɔ, be lɛ nɩbɛ na kõnõ tɩ ɔɔrɔ nyɩmɛ.’
14“Nɩyɔɔ lɛ ba bʊɔl, tɩchɛ bãlãa lɛ ban chɛl ir.”
15Be lɛ ka a Faraseemɩne guor taa na ba wa bɛɛr Yesu kaa na ba na nyɔɔ wʊ a wʊ 'yɛrbie pɔ. 16Be lɛ ba tʊ̃ a ba poturbo nɩ a nɩbɛ bamɩne na yi a Nãa Hɛrɔd sɛ̃, na ba 'yɛr, “Wiwile, sɩ bɔ̃ɔ naa ɩka fʊ ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ, na fʊ wile Nãaŋmɩn sɔr nɩ yelmãɛ, bojũu faa kaara lɛ nɩbɛ na 'yɛrɛ bɩɩ oor ɛ. 17'Yɛr kʊ sɩ a lɛ fʊn tɩɛr. A tara na sɔr ɩka sɩ yab a lõpoo kʊ a Nãkpɛ̃ɛ Siisa bɩɩ sɩ ta yab ɛ?” 18Tɩchɛ a Yesu na bɔ̃ɔn a ba pʊtɩdɛɛr jũu, ka ka wʊ sʊʊr ba, “Yɩn nɛɛr ayi dẽme. Bo lɛ yɩ bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ bɛɛr ma kaa? 19Yɩ wiil ma a libir n kaa.” Be lɛ ba de a libikur waan. 20Ka wʊ sʊʊr ba, “An foto nɩ an yuor lɛ be a libir pɔ?” 21Ka ba 'yɛr, “A Nãkpɛ̃ɛ Siisa lɛ.” Lɛ lɛ ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ de a 'lɔ na ɩ a Nãkpɛ̃ɛ Siisa sofʊ na yɩ kʊ wʊ, na yɩ mɩ de a 'lɔ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn sofʊ mɩ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn.” 22Ban wa wõ a nɩtɔ̃, nɛɛ 'maa ba naa ka ba bar wʊ tɩ chen jaa jomm.
23A bɩbir 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, a Saduseemɩne na 'yɛr ɩka a kũu pɔ irfʊ ba be be ɛ, ba wan a Yesu sɛ̃ wa sʊʊr wʊ, 24“Wiwile, Mosesɩ sɛb ɩka yɛbɛ wa kpi tɩ bar pɔɔ na ba tara bie ɛ, a wʊ yɛbɛ wʊ kul a pɔɔkʊɔr 'lɔ na wʊ dɔɔ bibiir kʊ a wʊ yɛbɛ 'lɔ na kpi. 25Yɛɛr ayopõi lɛ dɔ̃ɔ be a ka a sɩ sɛ̃ ka a ba kpɛ̃ɛ kul pɔɔ na waa dɔɔ bie ɛ, tɩ kpi tɩchɛ a pɔɔkʊɔr bar ka a yɛbɛ de kul. 26Ka a ayi sʊɔ mɩ de a pɔɔkʊɔr kul baa mɩ dɔɔ bie, tɩchɛ ka wʊ mɩ kpi. A lɛ nɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ ata tɩ tãn a ayopõi sʊɔ. 27Ba jaa na wa kul a pɔɔkʊɔr nyã lʊɔr taa baar a pɔɔkʊɔr nyã mɩ baar kpi. 28Bala wa ir yi a kũu pɔ, a nɩbɛ banyã ayopõi an pɔɔ, lɛ wʊn ɩ, an ɩ ba jaa kul wʊn lʊɔr taa?”
29Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yaa nyɛ yɩn bɔr, bojũu yaa bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn gãma nɩ a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ ɛ. 30Nɩbɛ wa ir a kũu pɔ, ba kʊ̃ lɛ kul taa ɛ, tɩ ban kaara fɩka malakasɩ na be a saaju. 31Tɩchɛ a kũu pɔ ir fʊ yele, yaa kar a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ɩka, 32n ɩ naa a Abraham Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a Isaakɩ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a Jekɔb Nãaŋmɩn ɛ? (A Yifʊ Gãn 3:6) Wʊ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn vʊr, waa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn kũu ɛ.”
33A nɩbɛ na wa wõ a nɩtɔ̃ nɛɛr 'maa ba naa nɩ a wʊ wiilfʊ.
34A Faraseemɩne na wa wõ ɩka Yesu 'yɛr tʊ̃ɔ a Saduseemɩne, ba mɩ lɔ̃ɔn taa. 35Ka a ba ãsʊɔ na ɩ a nɛɛ wiwile sʊʊr 'yɛrbir bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ bɛɛr a Yesu kaa, 36“Wiwile, A Mosesɩ nɛbinsɩ a jaa pɔ, buor lɛ ɩ kpɛ̃ɛ?” 37Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “ ‘Nʊ̃ a fʊ Soro Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a fʊ nyãa wʊ jaa, nɩ a fʊ nyɛvʊr wʊ jaa, nɩ a fʊ tɩɛr wʊ jaa.’ (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu 6:5) 38Nyã lɛ ɩ a kpɛ̃ɛ nɩ a nɛdɔ̃ɔ. 39A ayi sʊɔ mɩ nɩ nyã, ‘Nʊ̃ a fʊ tɔ sʊɔ a fʊ kaar.’ (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Ata 19:18) 40A Mosesɩ nɛɛr a jaa nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ wiilfʊ kpãkpãana na a binfʊ nyãna.”
41A Faraseemɩne na wa 'mataa, Yesu sʊʊr ba naa. 42“Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ yɩ tɩɛr a Nɩ-iraa yele? An bie lɛ wʊ ɩ?” Ka ba 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “David bie lɛ.”
43Ka a Yesu sʊʊr ba, “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ ka a nãa David a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na dɔ̃ɔ kpɛ, a wʊ bʊɔl wʊ ɩka, ‘N Soro’? Bojũu wʊ 'yɛr naa ɩka, 44‘A Soro 'yɛr kʊ a n Soro, “Jãnɛ a n nũsʊ̃ɔ jie, ka n wa de a fʊ dɔ̃dẽme ka ba ɩ a fʊ gbɛɛ dɔɔlfʊ jie.” ’ (Yiel Gãn 110:1) 45Ala ɩ David bʊɔl wʊn wʊ ɩka, ‘N Soro,’ ŋmɩnɛ wʊn ɩrɛ wa ɩ a wʊ bie?” 46An yɩ a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ chiine, nɩrɛ jaa ba lɛ haa nɛɛ 'yɛr 'yɛr ɛ bɩɩ lɛ 'la sʊʊr sʊʊrfʊ jaa go ɛ.

Title: MATIU 23
Content:
1Yesu pãa 'yɛr kʊ a nɩyɔɔ bala nɩ a wʊ poturbo, 2“A nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɩ a Faraseemɩne jãnɛ na a Mosesɩ dakɔɔ ju. 3A lɛ jũu, yɩ maala a lɛ ban wile tɩ na yɩ turo, tɩ yɩ ta maala a lɛ ban maala ɛ, bojũu ba maa turo a lɛ ban wile ɛ. 4Ba ma lũn tuor tɩɩr tuo nɩbɛ, tɩ maa sɔɔ de a ba nubir sɩɩr ɛ.
5“Yele jaa ban tʊ̃nɔ̃, ba ma bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka nɩbɛ ba nyɛ ba, na ba ma lũ a fɔɔr a ba jur pɔ, tɩ na ba ma su fuusɩ ban ma sɛ bonsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ jaa vɛvɛɛ. 6Bala wa lɔ̃ɔ taa dire, a ji'yɔ̃ɔnsɩ jie lɛ ba ma nʊ̃ ɩka ba jãnɛ, nɩ a ba lɔ̃ɔfʊ jiir a jibɛrɛ jiir. 7Ala tɩ na ba ma bʊɔrɔ ɩka bama puoro ba a dar pɔ, na ba ma bʊɔrɔ ɩka nɩbɛ ba bʊɔlɔ ba, Wiwiilbe.
8“Yɩ ta sɔɔ ka ba bʊɔlɔ yɩ, Wiwiilbe ɛ, nɩkpɛ̃ɛ bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ yɩ tara. Yɩ jaa ɩn yɛɛr. 9Yɩ ta bʊɔl nɩrɛ jaa yɩ, sãa a wɛr pɔ ɛ, bojũu yɩ tara na Sãa bʊ̃'yen na be a saaju. 10Bɩɩ yɩ ta bʊɔl nɩrɛ jaa wiwile ɛ, bojũu yɩ tara na Wiwile bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ na ɩ a Nɩ-iraa. 11A 'lɔ na bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ ɩ a yɩ kpɛ̃ɛ wʊ ɩ a yɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃. 12Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na 'mɔɔrɔ a wʊ mãɛ ire nɩ, Nãaŋmɩn na suun wʊn pĩlem tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ mɩ na siir wʊ mãɛ Nãaŋmɩn na 'mɔɔ wʊn ka wʊ do.
13“Tɩchɛ nɛbier ben a yɩn nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɩ a Faraseemɩne na ɩ a nɛɛr ayi dẽme sɛ̃. Yɩ pɔɔn a nɩbɛ var bar a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ. Yɩn mãɛ ba kpɩɛrɛ ɛ, tɩ na yɩ pɔɔ var a bala na bʊɔrɔ a kpɛfʊ bar.
15“Nɛbier ben a yɩn nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɩ a Faraseemɩne na ɩ a nɛɛr ayi dẽme sɛ̃. Yɩ ma yɔn jitɛbɛ nɩ a man pɔ na yɩ tɩ 'yɛr lɩɛb nɩrɛ tɩɛr, yɩn wa tʊ̃ɔ wʊ ka wʊ kaara a yɩ kaar, yɩ ma lɩɛb wʊ naa ka wʊn di dɔɔyɛ a bũu dagel pɔ a yɩ kaar.
16“Nɛbier ben a bala na ɩ jɔ̃n tɩ na ba tɔɔrɔ a jɔ̃n, na ba ma 'yɛr ɩka, ‘Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na pɔn a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir a ba ɩ tuo ɛ, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na pɔn a sɛlma 'lɔ na be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir a lũ wʊ naa.’ 17Yɩ ɩn jɔ̃n na yɩ ɩ jɔlɔ. Buor lɛ ɩ kpɛ̃ɛ, a sɛlma bɩɩ a Nãaŋmɩn yir 'lɔ na maal a sɛlma ka wʊ ɩ a chɛchɛ? 18Yɩ mɩ 'yɛr naa, ‘Ala ɩ nɩrɛ pɔn na a Nãaŋmɩn bɔɔr lofʊ jie, a ba tuo ɛ, tɩchɛ ala ɩ nɩrɛ pɔn na a Nãaŋmɩn kʊfʊ 'lɔ na dɔɔl a jie, a lũ wʊ naa.’ 19Yɩn jɔ̃n banyã. Buor lɛ ɩ kpɛ̃ɛ, a kʊfʊ bɩɩ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔɔr lofʊ jie na ma vɛ̃ ka wʊ ɩ chɛchɛ? 20A lɛ jũu, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na pɔn a Nãaŋmɩn bɔɔr lofʊ jie, pɔn wʊ naa nɩ bon jaa na dɔɔl a wʊ ju. 21Nɩrɛ 'lɔ mɩ na pɔn a Nãaŋmɩn yir, pɔn wʊ naa nɩ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na jãnɛ a be. 22Nɩrɛ 'lɔ mɩ na pɔn a saaju, pɔn naa a Nãaŋmɩn nãkɔɔ nɩ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ mɩ na jãnɛ a be.
23“Nɛbier ben a yɩn nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɩ a Faraseemɩne na ɩ a nɛɛr ayi dẽme sɛ̃. Yɩ ma ir a bonsɩ pɔ jiir pie pɔ bʊ̃'yen lɔ̃ɔn badʊʊ gba vaar kʊ Nãaŋmɩn, tɩ na yɩ tɔr a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛr ala na tɩrɛ bar na ɩ yelmãɛ sɔr tufʊ, nɩbaal kaafʊ nɩ yelmãɛ tarfʊ. A anyã lɛ a sɛɛ ɩka yɩ turo tɩ na yɩ taa ire amɩne bara ɛ. 24Yɩn jɔ̃tɔɔrbɔ ba nyã. Yɩ ma chuor a jãajubil bar tɩ ma vɔl a nyɔɔma.
25“Nɛbier ben a yɩn nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɩ a Faraseemɩne na ɩ a nɛɛr ayi dẽme sɛ̃. Yɩ ma pɛɛn a ŋmanyuraa nɩ a ladiraa a yõo tɩchɛ ka a pʊɔ sɛɛn bɔgar nɩ nyuur. 26Yɩn Faraseemɩne na ɩ jɔ̃n. Yɩ ma dɔ̃ɔ pɛɛ a ŋmanyuraa pʊɔ tɩchɛ ka a yõo mɩ pãa pɛɛ a yõo ka a vɩɛlɛ.
27“Nɛbier ben a yɩn nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɩ a Faraseemɩne na ɩ a nɛɛr ayi dẽme sɛ̃. Yɩ kaara fɩka yar ban pãɛ ka a vɩɛlɛ, tɩchɛ ka a pʊɔ pɔ tara nɩbɛ kɔbɔ nɩ dɛɛr jaa bʊrɔ. 28Lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ a yɩn a yõo, yɩ ɩn nɩtor a yɩ taaba sɛ̃, tɩchɛ a yɩ pʊɔm, yɩ tara na nɛɛr ayi nɩ putuyele.
29“Nɛbier ben a yɩn nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɩ a Faraseemɩne na ɩ a nɛɛr ayi dẽme sɛ̃. Yɩ mɛn a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ yar, tɩ na chɔɔr a bala na tor yar, 30tɩ na yɩ 'yɛr ɩka, ‘Sɩn ta be be a sɩ sãakpãmɩne sɔ̃ɔ, sɩ kʊ̃ naa ta pʊɔ ba kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ ɛ.’ 31A nɩtɔ̃ jũu yɩ din a yɩ mãɛ dãasɩɛ ɩka yɩ ɩn a nɩbɛ bala na kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ bibiir. 32Yɩ baar baar a lɛ a yɩ sãakpãmɩne na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ.
33“Yɩn waa bibiir, ŋmɩnɛ yɩn ɩrɛ wa chãɛ a bũu dagel kũu. 34A lɛ jũu ɩn tʊ̃n Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ, yɛ̃n dẽme, nɩ a wiwiilbe, ka yɩ kʊ bamɩne yɔɔl a daa ju, yɩn pɔɔn bamɩne na yɩ fɔb ba a yɩ lɔ̃ɔfʊ jiir, tɩ na yɩ pãa tulo yʊɔrɔ bʊɔrɔ ba a tẽn a jaa. 35Ka a na di yɩ a nɩbɛ bala na ɩ a nɩtor ba bɔ̃ɔ yele jaa yɩn kʊ, piel a Abel jãɩ sɔ̃ɔ tɩ tãn a Jekariya bidaba Barakiya ban kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔɔr lofʊ jie nɩ a puorfʊ jie chara pɔ. 36Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, a yɩn dɩna nɩbɛ na nyɛn gefʊ a yele anyãna jũu.
37“Pa yɩn Jerusalɛm nɩbɛ, a yɩn na ma kʊrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ na yɩ lɔɔrɔ a bala a Nãaŋmɩn na tʊ̃ a yɩ sɛ̃ nɩ kʊsɩbɛ, nyɛ lɛ an ma ɩrɛ ma vɔlaa jã ka n ma bʊɔrɔ ɩka n kaal a fʊ bibiir 'mataa fɩka nʊ̃ɔ na ma ũun a wʊ bil, tɩchɛ ka faa bʊɔrɔ ɩka fʊ maal a lɛ ɛ. 38A lɛ jũu n bar a fʊ tẽe kʊ fʊ ka wʊ ɩ dakpolo. 39Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka yɩ kʊ̃ lɛ nyɛ ma go ɛ, wa tɩ tãn yɩn na 'yɛr ɩka, ‘Nãaŋmɩn wʊ sʊ̃ʊ a 'lɔ wʊn tʊ̃.’ ” (Yiel Gãn 118:26)

Title: MATIU 24
Content:
1Yesu na wa yi a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir pɔ na wʊ chiine, a wʊ poturbo turo wile ɩka wʊ nyɛ lɛ ban mɛ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir ka wʊ kaara. 2Be lɛ a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Mɩ yɩ mɩ nyɛ naa anyãna a jaa? Yelmãɛ jaa lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, a kʊsɩvɩɛl anyãna ãsʊɔ jaa kʊ lɛ wa chɛnɛ dɔɔl a wʊ tɔ ju ɛ. Ban wa dãn a jaa lɔb.”
3Yesu na wa do jãnɛ a Olive Tɔ̃ɔju, a poturbo wan a wʊ sɛ̃ a ba tɛɛ wa sʊʊr wʊ, “'Yɛr kʊ sɩ a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ a anyãna nɩ na ɩ. Bo lɛ na ɩ a jãnɛ a fʊ waa sɔ̃ɔ nɩ a wɛr baarfʊ daar?”
4Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn sʊ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa ta wa bɛl yɩ ɛ. 5Bojũu, nɩyɔɔ na de naa maa yuor waan wa 'yɛrɛ, ‘Maa lɛ a Nɩ-iraa,’ na ban bɛl nɩyɔɔ. 6Yɩn wa wõn tam, ka ba 'yɛrɛ a tam 'yɛr, yɩ ta mɩrɛ ɛ. A lɛ na ɩ naa, tɩchɛ a wɛr baarfʊ chɛnɛ na be puor. 7Paal dẽdẽme na yin tam, ka a nãmɩne mɩ yɩ tam ka kɔ̃ mɩ lo ka a tẽe jiir amɩne dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃. 8A dɔɔyɛ anyãna, an kaara fɩka a pɔɔ na ma dɔɔrɔ ka a wõnõ wʊ.
9“Ban pãa nyɔɔr yɩn chiin na ba tɩ pɔb yɩ na ba kʊ yɩ, ka a paalsɩ a jaa 'laar yɩ, yɩn sɔɔ ma jũu. 10Nɩyɔɔ na bar a ba sɔɔfʊ, na ba gar 'yɔ̃ɔ taa na ba 'laar taa. 11Jir ŋmarba 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ na wan wa 'yɛrɛ bɛlɛ nɩyɔɔ. 12Nɩyɔɔ nɩ na tɔr Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ, ba kʊ̃ nʊ̃ taa ɛ. 13Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ nyã na ara tɩ tãn a baaraa Nãaŋmɩn na faa wʊ naa. 14Ban mʊɔl a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã a wɛr wʊ jaa ka a ɩ dãasɩɛ a paalsɩ a jaa pɔ, tɩchɛ ka a wɛr pãa baar.
15“Yɩn wa nyɛ naa a yele 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na 'laar na waara nɩ sɔ̃ɔfʊ ka wʊ be a jichɛchɛ 'lɔ nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ Danɩɛl na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr. Vɛ̃ ka a nyã na kara bɔ̃ɔ a par. (Danɩɛl 9:27) 16Yɩn wa nyɛ a lɛ a nɩbɛ bala na kpɩɛrɛ a Juda, ba jo do a tɔ̃ɔ ju. 17Nɩrɛ jaa na be gar ju, wʊ ta suu a die pɔ tɩ de bon jaa ɛ. 18'Lɔ mɩ na be a puo pɔ wʊ ta kul a yir tɩ de a wʊ fuu ɛ. 19A bɩbir nyãna wa vɩɛ an ɩn tuo kʊ a pɔɔpʊʊr nɩ a bala na tara a bi'yɛnsɩ. 20Yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn ka a yɩ jofʊ ta ɩ sãɛ ɛ, bɩɩ a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar ɛ. 21Nãaŋmɩn na maal a wɛr wa tãn a pʊ̃pãanyã, baa di a dɔɔyɛ nyã bʊrɔ ɛ, bɩɩ dɔɔyɛ kʊ̃ lɛ wa jã wʊ go ɛ. 22Ala ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn ba ŋmaa a ber ala bar ɛ, nɩrɛ kʊ̃ lɛ chɛnɛ go ɛ. Tɩchɛ a bala wʊn chɛl ir jũu wʊn ŋmaan a ber bar. 23A lɛ daar nɩrɛ wa 'yɛr yɩ ɩka, ‘Nyɛ a Nɩ-iraa,’ bɩɩ ‘'Lɔ nɩ nyã,’ yɩ ta sɔɔ de ɛ. 24Bojũu jirsɩ Nɩ-irsɩ nɩ jirsɩ 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ na wa naa wa tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ na ba bɛl nɩbɛ bamɩne ala ɩ ba tʊ̃ɔ naa ban 'mantaa bɛl a bala a Nãaŋmɩn na chɛl ir. 25Yɩ nyɛ, n den nie 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ.
26“A lɛ jũu, bala wa 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ɩka, ‘Nyɛ 'lɔ nɩ nyã a dãlpʊɔ ju,’ yɩ ta yi a be ɛ. ‘Bala wa 'yɛr nyɛ, 'lɔ nɩ nyã a die pɔ,’ yɩ ta sɔɔ ɛ. 27A lɛ a saa nyɩɩrfʊ na ma yi a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ purfʊ jie na wʊ chaar 'yɔ̃ɔ a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ mʊrfʊ jie, lɛ lɛ a maa Nɩsaal Bie waa mɩ na kaara. 28Jie 'lɔ jaa bʊ̃kũu na be, be lɛ a sɩdumo ma 'laara.
29“Ajienaa, a ber anyãna a dɔɔyɛ baarfʊ puor, ‘A mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ na lii naa, ka a chuu mɩ kʊ̃ lɛ chaar ɛ, ka a ŋmɛrbie pɔrɔ yire a saaju loro, ka a saaju bonsɩ a jaa dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃.’ (Isaiya 13:10)
30“A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ ban nyɛ a maa Nɩsaal Bie na waara a julõjuur pɔ, ka a paalsɩ a jaa na be ka a wɛr pɔ kõnõ. Ka ba nyɛ a maa Nɩsaal Bie na yi a saaju a julõjuur pɔ, waara nɩ kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ tɩɩr. 31Wʊn tʊ̃n a wʊ malakasɩ ka ba pɛɛl a ɩɩl kpɛ̃ɔ jaa na ba bʊɔl a nɩbɛ bala wʊn chɛl ir a wɛr wʊ jaa 'mataa.
32“Yɩ de a pɔlpɔl tɩɛr yele jãn yɛ̃. 'Lɔ wa tʊɔrɔ a vaar, yɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a tʊl sɔɔ gbʊr naa. 33A lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ, yɩn wa nyɛ a yelsɩ anyãna, yɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a maa Nɩsaal Bie waa gbʊr naa jaa yɛ̃yɛ̃. 34Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, a pʊ̃pãanyã nɩbɛ kʊ̃ kpi baar ɛ, wa tɩ tãn a yelsɩ anyãna na ɩ. 35A saaju nɩ a wɛr na wa baaraa, tɩchɛ maa 'yɛrbie 'lɔ kʊ̃ wa baar ɛ.
36“Nɩrɛ jaa ba bɔ̃ɔ a bɩbir nyã ɛ, bɩɩ a sɔ̃ɔ ɛ, a malakasɩ mɩ gba na be a saaju ba bɔ̃ɔ ɛ, bɩɩ a Bie ɛ, ka a Sãa tɛɛ ba lɛ bɔ̃ɔ ɛ. 37A lɛ an dɔ̃ɔ kaara a Nowa sɔ̃ɔ, lɛ lɛ an mɩ na kaara a maa Nɩsaal Bie waa sɔ̃ɔ. 38Bojũu sɛrɛ, tɩchɛ ka a kɔ̃paalaa wa nɩbɛ dire na, tɩ nyuro, ka dɔɔr nɩ pɔbɔ kulo taa, tɩ tãn a bɩbir 'lɔ a Nowa na kpɛ a daka bulomtum pɔ. 39Baa bɔ̃ɔn ɛ, tɩ tãn a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a kɔ̃paalaa na wa di ba, lɛ mɩ lɛ an kaara a maa Nɩsaal Bie waa daar. 40Nɩbɛ ayi na ben puo pɔ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn wa de a ãsʊɔ chiin tɩ bar a ãsʊɔ. 41Pɔbɔ ayi na 'mantaa nɩɛnɛ jɔ̃ ka a Nãaŋmɩn wa de a ãsʊɔ chiin tɩ bar a ãsʊɔ.
42“A lɛ jũu yɩ kaara sʊ̃, bojũu yaa bɔ̃ɔ a bɩbir 'lɔ a yɩ Soro nɩ na wa ɛ. 43Tɩchɛ yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a yele anyã par, a yir sʊɔ ta bɔ̃ɔn a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a nãnyie na waara a tãsɔɔ, wʊ kʊ̃ naa gur ɛ, ka a nãnyie wa kar kpɛ wʊ a yir ɛ. 44A lɛ jũu, yɩ mɩ guro a yɩ mãɛ, bojũu a maa Nɩsaal Bie na wan a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ yɩn kʊ̃ bɔ̃ɔn ɛ.
45“An lɛ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ɩ a yɛ̃ nɩ a yelmãɛ sʊɔ a wʊ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ na 'yɔ̃ɔ ka wʊ kaara wʊ a yir na wʊ kʊrɔ a tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ a ba bʊ̃diir a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ wʊn 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ? 46An ɩn bɔɔsʊ̃n kʊ a tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ nyãna a wʊ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ na wa nyɛ ka wʊ ɩrɛ a lɛ. 47Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, wʊn vɛ̃n ka wʊ kaara a wʊ bonsɩ a jaa. 48Tɩchɛ ala ɩ a tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ nyãna ɩn putusʊɔ na wʊ tɩɛr a wʊ nyãa pɔ ɩka, a n nɩkpɛ̃ɛ kor naa, 49tɩ piel gere a tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ bala na be a yir tɩ pãa ma di na wʊ ma pʊɔ a dãnyurbo pɔ, 50a wʊ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ na wa dũu wʊ naa a bɩbir 'lɔ wʊn ba tɩɛr nɩ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ wʊn ba bɔ̃ɔn ɛ. 51Wʊn ŋma wʊn gbʊl gbʊl 'yɔ̃ɔ a nɛɛr ayi dẽme pɔ, be lɛ ban kõnõ tɩ ɔɔrɔ nyɩmɛ.

Title: MATIU 25
Content:
1“A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ na kaara fɩka pɔɔsarsɩ pie na de a ba fãtɩnɛ ɩka ba tɩ tuor a pɔɔ paalaa nɩ a wʊ sɩrɛ. 2Ka a ba anũu ɩ jɔlɔ, tɩchɛ ka a ba anũu mɩ ɩ yɛ̃ dẽme. 3A jɔlɔ bala den a ba fãtɩnɛ tɩchɛ baa de kãa pʊɔ ɛ, 4tɩchɛ ka a ba anũu bala mɩ na ɩ a yɛ̃ dẽme, de kãa pʊɔ a ba fãtɩnɛ pɔ. 5A pɔɔ paalaa sɩrɛ na wa kor a waa jũu, gʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ba naa ka ba gã gur.
6“A tãsɔɔ bãɩn lɛ ba ŋme chɛlma tãna 'yɛrɛ, ‘A pɔɔ paalaa sɩrɛ waara, yɩ yi wa tuor wʊ yooo.’
7“A pɔɔsarsɩ pie banyãna vaan ir tɩɛ tɩɛ a ba gonsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba fãtɩnɛ pɔ. 8A jɔlɔ bala 'yɛr kʊ a yɛ̃ dẽme, ‘Yɩ pʊr a yɩ kãa amɩne kʊ sɩ, a sɩ bonsɩ kpĩine naa.’
9“Be lɛ ka a yɛ̃ dẽme bala 'yɛr kʊ ba, ‘Kai, a kʊ̃ ta sɩ nɩ a yɩn ɛ. Yɩ chen a be ban daara na yɩ tɩ da.’
10“Tɩchɛ, ban lɩɛb chiine a dafʊ jie, a pɔɔ paalaa sɩrɛ wa naa, ka a bala jaa na chɔɔr 'mataa kpɛ a pɔɔ paalaa kulfʊ jie, tɩ na ba nyɔɔ a pãn pɔɔ.
11“A jɔlɔ anũu bala mɩ wa bɩɛr wa na ba mɩ wa kpooro a pãn 'yɛr, ‘Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, yuo a pãn ka sɩ kpɛ.’
12“Tɩchɛ ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, ‘Yelmãɛ jaa, n ba bɔ̃ɔ yɩ ɛ.’
13“A lɛ jũu yɩ gu yɩ mãɛ bojũu yaa bɔ̃ɔ a bɩbir bɩɩ a sɔ̃ɔ ɛ.
14“A mɩ lɛ nyɛntãan go fɩka daba kɔ̃ɔ na bʊɔrɔ yɔfʊ na wʊ bʊɔl a wʊ gbãgbaar 'mataa de a wʊ bonsɩ põ ba. 15Wʊ kʊn ãsʊɔ sɛlbie anũu, na wʊ kʊ ãsʊɔ mɩ sɛlbie ayi na wʊ kʊ ãsʊɔ mɩ sɛlbir bʊ̃'yen. Wʊ ma kʊn ãsʊɔ jaa man a wʊ fɔ̃ɔ, tɩ na wʊ yɔ. 16A 'lɔ na de a sɛlbie anũu tɩ yar nyɛ sɛlbie anũu tʊ̃nɔ̃ dɔɔl. 17A 'lɔ mɩ na de a sɛlbie ayi tɩ yar mɩ nyɛ sɛlbie ayi tʊ̃nɔ̃ dɔɔl. 18Tɩchɛ a 'lɔ na de a sɛlbir bʊ̃'yen tɩ tuun bɔɔ de a wʊ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ sɛlbir ũu.
19“An wa kor bãlãa ka a gbãgbaar bala nɩkpɛ̃ɛ wa wa ɩka ba guor a sɛlbie yele. 20A 'lɔ na de a sɛlbie anũu waan na sɛlbie anũu wa 'yɛr, ‘Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, sɛlbie anũu lɛ fʊ dɔ̃ɔ kʊ ma, nyɛ sɛlbie anũu tɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ n nyɛ dɔɔl.’
21“Ka a wʊ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, ‘Fʊ tʊ̃n vɩla, gbãgbamãɛ lɛ fʊ ɩ. Fʊ tara na yelmãɛ a bʊ̃bile pɔ, ɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ fʊn ka fʊ kaara bʊ̃yɔɔ. Wa pʊɔ ma ka sɩ 'mataa dire a nʊ̃ɔ.’
22“A 'lɔ mɩ wʊn kʊ a sɛlbie ayi wa 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, ‘Fʊ dɔ̃ɔ kʊ ma sɛlbie ayi, nyɛ sɛlbie ayi tʊ̃nɔ̃ lɛ n nyɛ dɔɔl.’
23“Ka a wʊ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, ‘Fʊ tʊ̃n vɩla, gbãgbamãɛ lɛ fʊ ɩ. Fʊ tara na yelmãɛ a bʊ̃bile pɔ, ɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ fʊn ka fʊ kaara bʊ̃yɔɔ. Wa pʊɔ ma ka sɩ 'mataa dire a nʊ̃ɔ.’
24“A 'lɔ mɩ wʊn kʊ a sɛlbir bʊ̃'yen wa 'yɛr naa, ‘Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, n bɔ̃ɔn na fʊn ɩ nɩbikõo sʊɔ na fʊ ma ŋma a be fʊn ba bʊr ɛ, na fʊ ma wob a be fʊn maa yaar bar ɛ. 25Ala lɛ so ka dãbãɛ kpɛ ma ka de a fʊ sɛlbir tɩ ũu bar. Nyɛ a fʊ sɛlbir.’
26“Ka a wʊ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, ‘Fʊ̃ʊ gbãgbaputuo nɩ koro sʊɔ nyã. Fʊn ben bɔ̃ɔn ɩka n ma ŋman a be ɩn maa bʊr ɛ, naa wob a jie 'lɔ ɩn maa yaar bar ɛ, 27a ta sɛɛn ɩka fʊ ta de a n sɛlbir tɩ yɔ̃ɔ a libie yir pɔ, ka maa ta wa lɩɛb wa ka n nyɛ tʊ̃nɔ̃ dɔɔl ɛ?
28“ ‘Yɩ faa a sɛlbir bʊ̃'yen a wʊ sɛ̃ na yɩ kʊ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara a sɛlbie pie. 29Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na tara yɔɔ, ban kʊ wʊn yɔɔ pʊɔ ka ba tara yɔɔ tɩchɛ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba tara bon jaa ɛ, a bãlãa 'lɔ wʊn tara gba ban faan yin a wʊ sɛ̃. 30A gbãgbaburbur nyã 'lɔ, yɩ de wʊ lɔb bar yõo be lɛ ban kõnõ tɩ ɔɔrɔ nyɩmɛ.’
31“A maa Nɩsaal Bie wa wa a n tɩɩr pɔ, nɩ a n malakasɩ ba jaa, ɩn wa jãnɛ naa, a n tɩɩr nãalʊ̃ʊ dakɔɔ ju. 32A paalsɩ a jaa na pãa lɔ̃ɔ taa a n niem, ka n pãa oor a nɩbɛ nɩtãa lɛ pɛchinɛ na ma oor a piir nɩ a bʊʊr. 33Ɩn oon a piir bar a n nũsʊ̃ɔ jie, tɩchɛ ka a bʊʊr mɩ ara a n gʊbaa jie.
34“Ka n pãa 'yɛr kʊ a bala na be a n nũsʊ̃ɔ jie, ‘Yɩ wa, yɩn a n Sãa Nãaŋmɩn na sʊ̃ʊ. Yɩ wa kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ, de a yɩ nãbomo wʊn chɔɔr bin gun yɩ a wɛr pielfʊ sɔ̃ɔ. 35Bojũu kɔ̃ dɔ̃ɔ kpɛ ma, ka yɩ kʊ ma ka n di, kɔ̃nyũur dɔ̃ɔ kpɛ ma, ka yɩ kʊ ma kʊ̃ɔ ka n nyũ, n dɔ̃ɔ ɩ sãan ka yɩ ir ma sãan. 36N ba dɔ̃ɔ tara bʊ̃sursɩ ɛ, ka yɩ kʊ ma fuu ka n su, n dɔ̃ɔ bɩɛrɛ ka yɩ sãa ma. N dɔ̃ɔ be pɔɔfʊ die pɔ, ka yɩ wa piir ma kaa.’
37“A nɩmɩn na pãa lɩɛb sʊʊr wʊ, ‘Sɩ Soro, nyɩnɛ lɛ sɩ nyɛ fʊ, ka a kɔ̃ kpɛ fʊ, ka sɩ kʊ fʊ bʊ̃diir a fʊ di, bɩɩ ka kɔ̃nyũur kpɛ fʊ, ka sɩ kʊ fʊ kʊ̃ɔ a fʊ nyũ? 38Sɔ̃ɔ buor lɛ sɩ nyɛ fʊ, ka fʊ ɩ sãan ka sɩ ir fʊ a sãan, bɩɩ ka faa tara bʊ̃sursɩ ɛ, ka sɩ kʊ fʊ fuu a fʊ su? 39Sɔ̃ɔ buor lɛ sɩ nyɛ fʊ, ka fʊ bɩɛrɛ, ka sɩ tɩ piir fʊ kaa, bɩɩ sɔ̃ɔ buor lɛ ba nyɔɔ fʊ pɔɔ ka sɩ chen tɩ piir fʊ kaa?’
40“A nãa na 'yɛr kʊ ba, ‘Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, a lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ maal kʊ a nɩba'yɔ̃ɔnsɩ bala na ɩ a n sofʊ, maa lɛ yɩ maal kʊ.’
41“Tɩchɛ na wʊ pãa 'yɛr kʊ a bala mɩ na be a wʊ gʊbaa jie, ‘Pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ turo yɩ naa, yɩ tɔɔ chen be na yɩ tɩ kpɛ a bũu 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na gbɔɔ gun a tɩɩ nɩ a wʊ malakasɩ. 42Bojũu kɔ̃ dɔ̃ɔ kpɛ ma, ka yaa kʊ ma bon jaa ka n di ɛ. Kɔ̃nyũur dɔ̃ɔ kpɛ ma, ka yaa kʊ ma kʊ̃ɔ ka n nyũ ɛ. 43N dɔ̃ɔ ɩ sãan, ka yaa kaa ma sãan kaa fʊ ɛ, n ba tara bon jaa na su ɛ, ka yaa kʊ ma fuu ka su ɛ, ka n bɩɛrɛ, bɩɩ be pɔɔfʊ die pɔ, ka yaa wa piir ma kaa ɛ.’
44“Ka ba pãa mɩ lɩɛb sʊʊr wʊ, ‘Sɩ Soro, sɔ̃ɔ buor lɛ sɩ nyɛ fʊ, ka a kɔ̃ kpɛ fʊ, bɩɩ ka a kɔ̃nyũur kpɛ fʊ, bɩɩ ka fʊ ɩ sãan, bɩɩ ka faa tara bon jaa na su ɛ, bɩɩ ka fʊ bɩɛrɛ, bɩɩ ka fʊ be pɔɔfʊ die pɔ, ka saa kaa fʊ ɛ?’
45“Wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, ‘Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, yɩn ba maal kʊ a nɩba'yɔ̃ɔnsɩ bala ãsʊɔ ɛ, maa lɛ yaa maal kʊ ɛ.’
46“A nɩbɛ banyãna na chen a dɔɔyɛ 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ jie, tɩchɛ ka a nɩmɩn mɩ chen a nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ jie.”

Title: MATIU 26
Content:
1A Yesu na wa 'yɛr a anyãna a jaa baar, wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ poturbo, 2“Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a chɛn ber ayi ka a Gõl Bar Difʊ na ta, ka ba na de a maa Nɩsaal Bie tɩr ka ba kpa ma a daa ju.”
3A Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ lɔ̃ɔ taa a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ yir na di Kayafasɩ, 4na ba bʊɔrɔ vuo ban na tu nyɔɔ a Yesu na ba kʊ. 5Tɩchɛ ka ba 'yɛr, a ta ɩ a Gõl Bar Difʊ sɔ̃ɔ ɛ, ka jɛɛr taa ɩrɛ wa ir a chara pɔ ɛ.
6Yesu na wa be a Betanɩ a Simon 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a kɔ̃kɔ̃mɔ̃ yir, 7ban wa jɛ̃ dire, pɔɔ kɔ̃ɔ waan na pãrtɔvɩla nɩ kãnyũu kɔ̃ɔ dafʊ na ba wõnõ ɛ, na wʊ kpaar dɔɔl a Yesu ju.
8A poturbo na wa nyɛ a lɛ, ba nyɛn suur na ba 'yɛr, “Bo lɛ so ka wʊ sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a kãnyũu nyã bar a nɩtɔ̃? 9Fʊn taa den a kãnyũu anyãna da libiyɔɔ de kʊ a nɔ̃n dẽme.”
10Yesu na bɔ̃ɔn a ba tɩɛr, wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ yɩ mii 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ? Wʊ maal vɩla kʊ ma. 11A nɔ̃n dẽme 'lɔ, yɩn nɩ bala ben ka tɩchɛ maa kʊ be a yɩ sɛ̃ sɔ̃ɔ jaa ɛ. 12Wʊn kpaar a kãnyũu anyãna 'yɔ̃ɔ ma, wʊ maal a lɛ chɔɔr ma gun a n ũufʊ. 13Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, jie jaa ban wa mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyãna a wɛr wʊ jaa pɔ, ban 'yɛr naa a lɛ a pɔɔ nyã na ɩ na ba chɛnɛ tara a wʊ tɩɛr.”
14A Pie Nɩ Ayi bala ãsʊɔ ban bʊɔlɔ Judas Isɩkariyot chen a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ sɛ̃ 15tɩ sʊʊr ba, “Bo lɛ yɩn kʊ ma ala ɩ n de wʊn 'yɔ̃ɔ a yɩ nuur pɔ?” Ba sɔr sɛlbie lɩjɛr nɩ pie kʊ wʊ. 16An yɩ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ wʊ bʊɔrɔ na vuo wʊn na tu de a Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba nuur pɔ.
17A bɩbir dɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ɩ naa a Paanʊ̃kõo Lɔ̃ɔfʊ, ka a Yesu poturbo wa sʊʊr wʊ, “Nyɩnɛ lɛ fʊ bʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ chen tɩ chɔɔr a Gõl Bar nyã Difʊ bar ka sɩ tɩ di?”
18Ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ chen a tẽe pɔ, daba kɔ̃ɔ sɛ̃ na yɩ tɩ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, ‘A wiwile 'yɛr naa, a n sɔ̃ɔ gbʊr naa, ka maa nɩ a n poturbo na di a Gõl Bar Difʊ a fʊ yir.’ ” 19A poturbo ɩn a lɛ jaa a Yesu na 'yɛr ɩka ba ɩ. Ka ba maal a Gõl Bar bʊ̃diir.
20A jãanʊɔr na wa ta, Yesu nɩ a wʊ poturbo Pie nɩ Ayi wa jɛ̃n jil a bʊ̃diir na di. 21Ban wa dire, wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, a yɩ ãsʊɔ na gar 'yɔ̃ɔ ma.”
22Be lɛ ka ba jaa pʊʊr sɔ̃ɔ ka ba sʊrɔ wʊ bʊ̃'yen 'yen, “An ɩn maa lɛ ɔ, n Soro?”
23Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “A 'lɔ ɩn 'mataa tun ala bʊ̃'yen pɔ lɛ na gar 'yɔ̃ɔ ma. 24A maa Nɩsaal Bie na kpi naa nɩtãa lɛ ban sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ. Tɩchɛ nɛbier ben a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na gar 'yɔ̃ɔ a maa Nɩsaal Bie wʊn din dɔɔyɛ gar nɩrɛ jaa. Bala ta ba dɔɔ wʊ ɛ, ala sa.”
25Judas a 'lɔ na gar 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ sʊʊr, “An ɩn maa lɛ ɔ, Wiwile?” Ka a Yesu sɔɔ, “Ɔ̃ɔ, fʊ̃ʊ lɛ.”
26Ban wa dire, Yesu den a paanʊ̃ɔ puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan na wʊ ŋma de kʊ a wʊ poturbo, tɩ na wʊ 'yɛr, “Yɩ de 'wɔb, a maa ãgãn lɛ.”
27Wʊ lɛ den a ŋmele 'lɔ ban nyuro nɩ, na wʊ puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan tɩ lɛ de kʊ ba, “Yɩ jaa yɩ de nyũ. 28A anyãna lɛ ɩ a n jãɩ na ɩ a nɛtɩraa ɩn tara nɩ yɩ na tara kpɛ̃ɔ. An kpaar na a faa nɩyɔɔ ka yelbier vɛ̃ kʊfʊ be be. 29N 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, n kʊ̃ lɛ nyũ a dãa anyãna ɛ, wa tɩ tãn a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ɩn na 'mataa nyũn yɩ a dãpaalaa a n Sãa nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ.”
30Ban wa yiel a yiel dãn Nãaŋmɩn, ba suun chen a Olive Tɩɩr Tɔ̃ɔ ju.
31Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ jaa na jon a tãsɔɔ nyãna tɩ bar ma a n yõ, a maa jũu. A sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, ‘Ɩn ŋme naa pɛchinɛ kʊ ka a piir yɛ̃yɛl.’ (Jekariya 13:7) 32Tɩchɛ maa wa ir a kũu pɔ, ɩn dɔ̃ɔ yɩn nie chen a Galilee.”
33Ka a Pita 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Ala ɩ ba jaa sɔɔn bar fʊ a fʊ jũu, maa 'lɔ kʊ̃ bar fʊ ɛ.”
34Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a Pita, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ fʊ, ɩka a tãsɔɔ nyãna a nɔrdɔ̃ɔ kʊ̃ kõ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka fʊ chiir ma gbɛɛ ata.”
35Tɩchɛ ka a Pita 'yɛr kʊ wʊ ɩka, “Ala ɩ maa nɩ fʊ̃ʊ na 'mataa kpi gba, tɩ n kʊ̃ 'yɛr ɩka n ba bɔ̃ɔ fʊ ɛ.” Ka a poturbo bala mɩ na chɛ 'yɛr a lɛ nɛ.
36Yesu nɩ a wʊ poturbo chen a jie 'lɔ ban bʊɔlɔ a Getɩsemanɩ, ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ jãnɛ a kana tɩchɛ ka n chen tɩ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn.” 37Be lɛ wʊ tara Pita nɩ Jebedee bibiir ayi ka a wʊ pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ yɔɔ jaa ka tɩɛr nyɔɔ wʊ. 38Ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “N tɩɛr sɔ̃ɔ naa, tɩ nyɛtãan kũn, yɩ jãnɛ a ka na gu ma.”
39Wʊ chen a niem bãlãa tɩ lo kpa tẽe sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrɛ, “N Sãa ala ɩ a tara naa ɩfʊ kɔ̃ɔ, vɛ̃ ka a dɔɔyɛ ŋmele nyãna po ma. Tɩchɛ a ta ɩ lɛ maa na bʊɔrɔ ɛ, tɩ a ɩ a lɛ fʊ̃ʊ na bʊɔrɔ.”
40Wʊ lɩɛb wa a poturbo sɛ̃ wa nyɛ ka ba guro. Ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A mɔ̃ yɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ jɛ̃ bãlãa jaa gu ma ɛ? 41Yɩ jɛɔ chɛlɛ, na yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn ka a bɛɛr kaa ta wa nyɔɔ yɩ ɛ. A ba tɩɛr bʊɔrɔ naa tɩchɛ ka a ba ãgãma ba tʊɔr ɛ.”
42Wʊ lɛ chen a gbɛɛ ayi sʊɔ tɩ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn. “N Sãa, ala ɩ a dɔɔyɛ ŋmele nyã kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ po ma ɛ, ka maa ba nyũn wʊ ɛ, fʊ̃ʊ bɔfʊ wʊ ɩ.”
43Wʊ lɛ wan wa nyɛ ka ba chɛnɛ guro, bojũu gʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ba naa. 44Be lɛ wʊ lɛ bar ba tɩ chen a gbɛɛ ata sʊɔ tɩ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn a lɛ nɛ nɩ wʊ ju.
45Wʊ lɩɛb wa a poturbo sɛ̃ wa sʊʊr ba, “Yɩ chɛnɛ na gã guro na yɩ pɛnɛ wɛ? Nyɛ, a sɔ̃ɔ ta naa ka ban gar 'yɔ̃ɔ a maa Nɩsaal Bie de wʊ kʊ a yelbe-ɩrbɛ. 46Yɩ vaa ir ka sɩ chen. Yɩ nyɛ a gagaraa na waara.”
47A Yesu na chɛnɛ 'yɛrɛ, ka Judas na ɩ a wʊ poturbo Pie nɩ Ayi ãsʊɔ, tɩ daasãa nɩ nɩbɛ na yi a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ sɛ̃ waara nɩ sɔbɛrɛ nɩ dakʊrsɩ a wʊ sɛ̃. 48A Judas dɔ̃ɔ man ba ɩka, a 'lɔ wʊn tɩ puor tɩ mʊʊr a kɔtɩr 'lɔ lɛ, yɩ nyɔɔ wʊ. 49Ban wa tɩ ta, Judas pɔɔn chen tɩ 'yɛr, “Wiwile, n puor fʊ naa,” tɩ mʊʊr a Yesu kɔtɩr.
50Ka Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “N badaba, tʊ̃ a lɛ fʊn bʊɔrɔ ɩka fʊ tʊ̃.” Be lɛ ba wa nyɔɔ a Yesu. 51Be lɛ ka a Yesu poturbo ãsʊɔ na ara gbʊr wʊ vʊ̃ɔ a sʊɔ chen a Juu dẽme bɔɔrlo nãa gbãgbaa toor ŋmaa.
52Be lɛ ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “De a sʊɔ su a sʊkpa pɔ, bala na jɛɛrɛ nɩ a sʊɔ na kpin a sʊɔ kũu. 53Fʊ tɩɛr ɩka n kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ bʊɔl a n Sãa ka wʊ sʊ̃ʊ ma nɩ a malakasɩ gbulo pie nɩ ayi bɩɩ? 54Tɩchɛ ŋmɩnɛ lɛ an ɩrɛ wa ɩ yelmãɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãma na 'yɛr ɩka a nɩtɔ̃ lɛ na ɩ?”
55A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, a Yesu sʊʊr a nɩyɔɔ bala, “A mɔ̃ nɩbier lɛ n ɩ ka yɩ waan sʊʊr nɩ dakʊrsɩ a n nyɔɔ fʊ jie wɛ? Bɩbir jaa lɛ n ma jãnɛ wile yɩ a puorfʊ yir bɛchaar pɔ, tɩ yaa nyɔɔ ma ɛ. 56Tɩchɛ a ɩ naa a lɛ ka a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a Nãaŋmɩn gãma pɔ ɩ yelmãɛ.” Be lɛ ka a Yesu poturbo ba jaa bar wʊ tɩ jo.
57A bala na nyɔɔ a Yesu, chiin wʊ naa a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nãa Kayafasɩ sɛ̃, ka a nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ ba jaa wa lɔ̃ɔ taa. 58Tɩchɛ ka Pita be a puor jaa turo, na wʊ tɩ kpɛ a bɔɔrlo nãa yir bɛchaar pɔ, tɩ lɔ̃ɔ jãnɛ nɩ a gugurbo, ɩka wʊ nyɛ lɛ an na baar.
59Ka a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ nɩbɛrɛ pãa bʊɔrɔ jir ŋmarba ka ba na ŋmaa jire 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ, ka ba na tu a be kʊ a Yesu. 60Tɩchɛ baa nyɛ yele jaa a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ. Nɩyɔɔ daan yi ŋma jiryɔɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ, tɩchɛ ka a ba 'yɛrbie ɩ jirsɩ. A baaraa nɩbɛ ayi daan yi 61na ba 'yɛr ɩka, “A daba nyãna lɛ 'yɛr ɩka, ‘Ɩn tʊ̃ɔ ŋmɛr a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir nyãna bar tɩ de ber ata lɛ mɛn wʊ.’ ”
62A be lɛ ka a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nãa ir ara tɩ sʊʊr a Yesu, “Faa tara 'yɛr jaa na 'yɛr bɩɩ? Bo dãasɩɛ lɛ a anyã ban dire dɔɔlɔ fʊ?” 63Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu ɩ jaa gbul. Be lɛ ka a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nãa 'yɛr, “N sʊrɔ fʊ naa a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ a vʊr niem, ɩka fʊ 'yɛr kʊ sɩ, ala ɩ fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a Nɩ-iraa na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie.”
64Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Ɔ̃ɔ, a lɛ nɛ fʊn 'yɛr lɛ. Tɩchɛ yɩ jaa lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ ɩka daar kɔ̃ɔ, yɩn nyɛn a maa Nɩsaal Bie na jãnɛ a Kpɛ̃ɔ Sʊɔ nũsʊ̃ɔ jie. Yɩ mɩ na lɛ nyɛ ma naa ka n yɩ a julõjuur pɔ waara.”
65Ka a bɔɔrlo nãa tɔɔ a fuu chɩɛr tɩ 'yɛr, “Wʊ sɔ̃ɔn Nãaŋmɩn yuor. Bo lɛ so sɩn chɛnɛ bʊɔrɔ dãasɩdirbe? Yɩ wõn wʊ tʊ Nãaŋmɩn. 66Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ yɩ tɩɛr?” Ka ba 'yɛr, “Wʊ sɛɛn kũu.”
67Ba chir nataar 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ a nie pɔ, tɩ ma gbul nũu ŋmen wʊ, ka bamɩne mɩ ma 'ma wʊ, 68tɩ sʊʊr, “Nɩ-iraa, ala ɩ fʊ bɔ̃ɔn yele jaa wiil sɩ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ŋme fʊ?”
69Pita jãnɛ naa a yõo a bɛchaar pɔ. Ka a gbãgbapɔɔbile ãsʊɔ wa a wʊ sɛ̃ wa 'yɛr, “Fʊ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ turo a Yesu na yi a Galilee.”
70Tɩchɛ ka wʊ chiir a ba jaa niem tɩ 'yɛr, “N ba bɔ̃ɔ a 'yɛr 'lɔ par fʊn 'yɛrɛ ɛ.”
71Wʊn wa tɩ ara a dɔ̃dɔr nɛɛ, a pɔɔbile ãsʊɔ nyɛ wʊ naa na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ na ara a be, “A daba nyã mɩ dɔ̃ɔ turo a Yesu na yi a Najaretɩ.”
72Be lɛ a Pita lɛ chiir pɔ tɩ 'yɛr ɩka, “N ba bɔ̃ɔ a daba nyãna ɛ.”
73A ba kor ɛ, ka a bala na ara gbʊr a Pita mɩ 'yɛr, “Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ, fʊ ɩ naa a ba ãsʊɔ. A fʊ kɔkɔr yin fʊn chãa pɔ.”
74Be lɛ ka a Pita pɔrɔ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a wʊ mãɛ tɩ mɩ pɔrɔ kʊrɔ ba 'yɛrɛ ɩka, “N ba bɔ̃ɔ a daba nyãna ɛ.” Ka a nɔraa mɩ tɔ̃ɔ kõ. 75Be lɛ ka Pita tɩɛr tɔ a lɛ a Yesu na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr, “Fʊn chiir ma naa gbɛɛ ata tɩchɛ ka a nɔraa kõ.” Ka a Pita ir yi a yõo tɩ kõ nɩbaal kõn.

Title: MATIU 27
Content:
1A wɛr na wa chaar bibio, a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ ba jaa lɔ̃ɔ taa guor lɛ ban na ɩ kʊ a Yesu. 2Ba lũ wʊn tara chiin a paal Nãkpɛ̃ɛ Pilate sɛ̃.
3Judas na gar 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ na wa nyɛ ɩka ba tɔɔr a Yesu 'yɛr guor a wʊ kʊfʊ, wʊ pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ naa ka wʊ lɛ lɩɛb a libibie lɩjɛr nɩ pie na wʊ tɩ kʊ a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ. 4Tɩ na wʊ 'yɛr, “N maal yelbier nɩ ɩn gar 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩrɛ na ba maal yelbier jaa ɛ.” Tɩchɛ ka ba 'yɛr, “Sɩ baka ba lɛ ɛ? Fʊ 'yɛr a ɩ.” 5Wʊ den a libie lɔb bar a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir pɔ, tɩ na wʊ yi tɩ yɔɔl miir.
6Ka a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ wob a libie na ba 'yɛr ɩka a ba sɛɛ ɩka sɩ de yaa 'yɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir libie pɔ ɛ, bojũu a ɩn jãɩ libie. 7Ban wa guor taa baar, ba den a libie dãn a lamɩɛr wɛr a jie ban ma ũno sãanba. 8Lɛ lɛ so ka nɩbɛ bʊɔlɔ a jie nyã, “Jãɩ Wɛr,” wa tãn dɩna. 9A ɩn yelmãɛ nɩ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ Jeremiya na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr, “Ba den a libibie lɩjɛr nɩ pie a lɛ a Isɩral nɩbɛ na sɔɔ de, 10na ba dãn a lamɩɛr wɛr nɩtãa lɛ a sɩ Soro na 'yɛr.” (Jeremiya 19:1-13)
11Yesu na wa ara a Nãkpɛ̃ɛ Pilate niem, wʊ sʊʊr wʊ naa, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ nãa ɔ?” Ka a Yesu 'yɛr “Ɔ̃ɔ, a lɛ nɛ fʊn 'yɛr lɛ.”
12A bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ na sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a wʊ yuor, waa 'yɛr 'yɛr jaa ɛ. 13Be lɛ a Pilate sʊʊr wʊ, faa 'yɛrɛ 'yɛr jaa wɛ? Nyɛ lɛ ban sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a fʊ yuor jã? 14Tɩchɛ a Yesu ba haa nɛɛ sɔɔ wʊ nɩ a ala a jaa ban 'yɛrɛ dɔɔlɔ wʊ ɛ, ka a 'maa a Pilate nɛɛ.
15A lɔ̃ɔ difʊ sɔ̃ɔ wa ta, ba ma 'yɛr ɩka a Nãkpɛ̃ɛ Pilate wʊ ir nɩrɛ 'lɔ a nɩbɛ na bʊɔrɔ a pɔɔ fʊ die pɔ bar. 16A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, ba pɔɔn daputuo sʊɔ kɔ̃ɔ nɩrɛ jaa na bɔ̃ɔ ka wʊ di Barabasɩ. 17A lɛ a nɩyɔɔ na wa lɔ̃ɔ taa, Pilate sʊʊr ba naa, “An lɛ yɩ bʊɔrɔ ɩka n yuo kʊ yɩ, Barabasɩ bɩɩ Yesu, a 'lɔ ban bʊɔlɔ a Nɩ-iraa?” 18Bojũu wʊ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a nyuur ban tara nɩ a Yesu lɛ so ban nyɔɔ wʊ waan a wʊ sɛ̃.
19A Pilate na wa jãnɛ a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ dakɔɔ ju, a wʊ pɔɔ tʊ̃n 'yɛr wʊ, “Taa ɩrɛ wa ɩrɛ a daba 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ na ba maal bon jaa yele jaa ɛ, bojũu jãa, n din dɔɔyɛ jãn pɔ nɩ a wʊ yele.”
20Tɩchɛ a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ 'yɛr kʊ a nɩyɔɔ ɩka ba sʊɔr ka wʊ yuo Barabasɩ bar, tɩ kʊ a Yesu.
21Ka a Nãa Pilate lɛ bɔ̃ɔ sʊʊr ba go, “A nɩbɛ banyã ayi, buor lɛ yɩ bʊɔrɔ ɩka n yuo kʊ yɩ?” Ka ba 'yɛr, “Barabasɩ.”
22Ka a Nãa Pilate sʊʊr ba, “Tɩ n ɩ ŋmɩnɛ nɩ a 'lɔ yɩn bʊɔlɔ a Nɩ-iraa?” Ka ba jaa 'yɛr, “Kpa wʊ a daa ju.”
23Ka wʊ sʊʊr ba, “Bo yelbier lɛ wʊ ɩ? Bo dɛɛr lɛ wʊ maal?” Tɩchɛ ka ba tãna kpɛ̃ɔ jaa 'yɛrɛ, “Kpa wʊ a daa ju.”
24A Pilate na wa nyɛ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ yele jaa ɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka a nɩbɛ wɩlɛwɩlɛ jaa tɩ gar, ka wʊ de kʊ̃ɔ pɛɛn a wʊ nuur a nɩyɔɔ niem, tɩ na wʊ 'yɛr, “Maa ba pʊɔ a daba nyã kũu pɔ ɛ. Yɩn sɛ̃ lɛ a be.”
25Be lɛ ka a nɩbɛ ba jaa 'mataa 'yɛr, “Vɛ̃ ka a wʊ jãɩ dɔɔl a sɩn nɩ a sɩ bibiir ju.”
26Be lɛ wʊ yuo a Barabasɩ kʊ ba. Wʊ vɛ̃ naa ka ba fɔb a Yesu tɩ wʊ de wʊ kʊ a sojasɩ ka ban tɩ kpa a daa ju.
27Be lɛ ka a sojasɩ tara a Yesu tɩ kpɛ̃n a nãa yir kpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ pɔ, tɩ bʊɔl a ba taaba sojasɩ lɔ̃ɔ taa. 28Ba yaar a wʊ bonsɩ bar tɩ de fuu jɩɛ su wʊ, 29na ba lɛ de gʊʊr wob nãa jupil kaar su wʊ. Ba den dãgbal 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ a nũsʊ̃ɔ pɔ, na ba gbur dumo a wʊ niem laara wʊ, “Yãan yooo, Juu nɩbɛ nãa!” 30Ba ma chɩr nataar 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ tɩ de daa ŋmen wʊ a ju pɔ. 31Ban wa la wʊ a nɩtɔ̃ wa baar, ba yãan a fuu jie 'lɔ bar tɩ de a wʊ mãɛ fuu su wʊ, na ba pãa de wʊ chiin ɩka ba tɩ kpa a daa ju.
32Ban wa yi a sɔr pɔ, ba nyɛn daba na yi Sirenɩ ka a wʊ yuor di Simon, ka ba nyɔɔ wʊ fɩr wʊ ka wʊ tuo a Yesu daa. 33Ba tɩ tãn jie ban bʊɔlɔ Gɔlgɔta, a par lɛ ɩka, Julaa Jie. 34Ba den tãɩtuo 'yɔ̃ɔ dãa pɔ ɩka a Yesu wʊ nyũ, tɩ wʊn wa lɛm kaa, wʊ tɔr bar. 35Ban wa kpa wʊ a daa ju baar, ba põ naa a wʊ fɔɔr ŋmen gbãm bɔ̃ɔn ala ãsʊɔ jaa nɩ na di, 36tɩ na ba jãnɛ a jie pire wʊ. 37Ba sɛb a yele 'lɔ jũu ban kʊn wʊ mar a daa ju ɩka, NYƐ A YESU, A JUU NƖBƐ NÃA. 38Ba mɩ kpan nɩfarba ayi a dabãbãnsɩ mɩ ju, ka ãsʊɔ be a Yesu nũsʊ̃ɔ jie ka ãsʊɔ mɩ be a wʊ gubaa jie. 39A bala na tala a be tʊrɔ wʊ, na ba vavire jur 40'yɛrɛ, “A fʊ̃ʊ na 'yɛr ɩka fʊn ŋmɛr a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir tɩ de ber ata mɛn, faa a fʊ mãɛ. Ala ɩ fʊ ɩ naa a Nãaŋmɩn Bie, wa suu a daa ju.”
41Lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ mɩ laara wʊ, 42na ba 'yɛrɛ, “Wʊ faan nɩbɛ bamɩne, tɩ wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ faa a wʊ mãɛ ɛ. 'Lɔ lɛ ɩ a Isɩral Nãa, wʊ wa suu a daa ju a pʊ̃pãanyãna, ka sɩ sɔɔ de wʊ. 43Wʊ sɔɔn Nãaŋmɩn. Vɛ̃ ka Nãaŋmɩn faa wʊ a pʊ̃pãanyãna, bojũu wʊ 'yɛr naa ɩka wʊ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn Bie.” 44Lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ a nɩfarba ayi bala mɩ ban kpa gbʊr wʊ, mɩ tʊ wʊ.
45A mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ na wa ara gar ju sãlsɔɔ, a wɛr wʊ jaa sɔb naa tɩ tãn a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ balfʊ sɔ̃ɔ. 46A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ a Yesu chɩɩr kpɛ̃ɔ jaa na wʊ 'yɛr, “Ɛloɩ, Ɛloɩ, lama sabakatanɩ.” A par lɛ ɩka “N Nãaŋmɩn, n Nãaŋmɩn, bo lɛ so fʊn lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ ma?” (Yiel Gãn 22:1)
47A nɩbɛ bala na ara gbʊr wʊ, na wa wõ a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr, ka ba 'yɛr ɩka, “Elaija lɛ wʊ bʊɔlɔ.”
48Ajienaa ka a daba ãsʊɔ jo chen tɩ 'mɔɔ sapɔ 'lɔr a dãmiir amɩne pɔ, na wʊ char daa pɔ, de kʊ a Yesu ɩka wʊ mʊʊr. 49Tɩchɛ ka bamɩne 'yɛr, “Yɩ bar a sɩ kaara, Elaija na wa yɔɔ wʊ naa bɩɩ.”
50Be lɛ a Yesu chɩɩr kpɛ̃ɔ jaa tɩ ŋmaa a vʊʊr.
51Ka a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir pɔ, ban lũ fɔbaa chɩɛr a saaju tɩ gbem a par. Ka a tẽe dãm, ka a kʊsɩbɛ mɩ ŋmɛr ŋmɛr. 52A yar mɩ yuo yuor, ka a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ bamɩne na dɔ̃ɔ kpi, jɛɔ. 53Ban wa yi a ba yar pɔ a lɛ, ka a Yesu na wa ir a kũu pɔ baar, ka ba pãa kpɛ a tẽchɛchɛ pɔ, ka nɩyɔɔ jaa tɩ nyɛ ba.
54A sojasɩ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nɩ a bala wʊn ara nɩ na ba pire a Yesu, nyɛn a wɛr na dãm nɩ a lɛ jaa na ɩ, ka dãbãɛ kpɛ ba, ka ba 'yɛr, “Yelmãɛ jaa lɛ, a daba nyã ɩn a Nãaŋmɩn Bie.”
55Pɔɔ yɔɔ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ be a be ara tɛɛr jaa kaara, bala lɛ dɔ̃ɔ tu wʊ yin a Galilee na ba sʊ̃nɔ̃ wʊ. 56A pɔbɔ banyãna pɔ lɛ Mɛɛr na yi Magdala, nɩ Mɛɛr na ɩ Jemesɩ nɩ Josefʊ ma, nɩ a Jebedee bibiir ma.
57A jãanʊɔr na wa ta, a taraa sʊɔ kɔ̃ɔ na yɩ Arimatɩya ban bʊɔlɔ Josefʊ, wʊ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a Yesu poturo. 58Wʊ chen a Pilate sɛ̃ tɩ sʊɔr a Yesu ãgãn. Ka a Pilate bar sɔr ka ba yɔɔ a Yesu kʊ wʊ. 59A Josefʊ yɔɔn a ãgãn pil fɔpɩla, 60kul tɩ ũu a wʊ mãɛ yaa paalaa pɔ wʊn chɩ a kʊsɩr pɔ. Wʊ bil kʊsɩr wa pɔɔ a yaa nɛɛ tɩ na wʊ kul. 61Mɛɛr na yi Magdala nɩ a Mɛɛr ãsʊɔ ben be jãnɛ a yaa puor.
62A Chɔɔrfʊ Bɩbir ka a wɛr na chaar ka a ɩ a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir lɛ, a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a Faraseemɩne chen tɩ 'yɛr a Nãkpɛ̃ɛ Pilate, 63“Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, sɩ lɛ tɩɛr a lɛ a jir ŋmara 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr wʊn dɔ̃ɔ chɛnɛ, ‘Ɩka ber ata daar ɩn lɛ lɩɛb ir ɩ vʊr.’ 64A lɛ jũu vɛ̃ ka ba gu a yaa tɩ tãn a ber ata daar, ka ala ba ɩ lɛ ɛ, a wʊ poturbo na chen tɩ ju a ãgãn a yaa pɔ, tɩ 'yɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ ɩka, 'lɔ lɛ ir a kũu pɔ, ka a bɛlfʊ taa ɩ dɛɛr gar a lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr ɛ.”
65Ka a Pilate 'yɛr, “Yɩ de gugurbo ka ba tɩ gu a yaa a lɛ yɩn bɔ̃ɔ.” 66Be lɛ ba tara a gugurbo chiin ka ba tɩ bɛ a yaa bɔɔ pɔɔ, tɩ na ba 'yɔ̃ɔ a kʊsɩr jãnɛ, tɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ ka a gugurbo ara gu.

Title: MATIU 28
Content:
1A Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir na wa baar, ka a na ɩ a Pɛ̃nfʊ divɩɛ bio daar a wɛr na wa chaara wa la la la, Mɛɛr na yi a Magdala nɩ a Mɛɛr ãsʊɔ yin chen ɩka ba tɩ kaa a yaa.
2Be lɛ ka a tẽe dãm kpɛ̃ɔ jaa, ka a ɩ Nãaŋmɩn malaka lɛ yi a saaju suu wa bil a kʊsɩr bar a yaa nɛɛ tɩ do jãnɛ. 3A wʊ nie nyɩlɛ saa nyɩɩrfʊ kaar, ka a wʊ bʊ̃sursɩ pɛl jaa pɩlpɩl. 4Dãbãɛ kpɛ̃n a bala na ara kaara, ka ba gĩem ara kũn kaar.
5A malaka 'yɛr kʊ a pɔbɔ, “Yɩ ta joro dãbãɛ ɛ, n bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a Yesu 'lɔ ban kpa a daa ju lɛ yɩ bʊɔrɔ. 6Waa be ka ɛ. Wʊ ir naa ɩ vʊr nɩtãa a lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr. Yɩ wa muul kaa a jie wʊn gã. 7Yɩ chen fɔɔ jaa na yɩ tɩ 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ poturbo, ‘Wʊ lɩɛb ir a kũu pɔ, na wʊ de yɩ nie chiine a Galilee. Be lɛ yɩn tɩ nyɛ wʊ.’ N pãa 'yɛr kʊ yɩ.”
8A pɔbɔ banyãna yin a yaa par nɩ dãbãɛ jo fɔɔ jaa nɩ pʊpɛl chen ɩka ba tɩ 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ poturbo. 9Be lɛ ka ajienaa, ka a ɩ Yesu lɛ tuor puor ba, ka ba lo kpa a wʊ niem nyɔɔ a wʊ gbɛɛ puor wʊ. 10Be lɛ a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, yɩ ta joro dãbãɛ ɛ, “Yɩ tɩ 'yɛr kʊ a n yɛɛr ɩka ba chen a Galilee, be lɛ ban tɩ nyɛ ma.”
11A pɔbɔ na wa chiine, a sojasɩ bamɩne na dɔ̃ɔ guro a yaa kpɛ̃n a tẽkpɛ̃ɛ pɔ, tɩ 'yɛr kʊ a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ a lɛ jaa na ɩ. 12A bɔɔrlo nãa nɩ a wʊ nɩbɛrɛ na wa lɔ̃ɔ taa, ba guor taa de libiyɔɔ kʊ a sojasɩ 13tɩ na ba 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ 'yɛr ɩka, ‘A wʊ poturbo lɛ wa ju a wʊ ãgãn a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ sɩn chɛnɛ gã guro.’ 14Ala ɩ a 'yɛr nyã wa lon a Nãa Pilate toor pɔ, sɩn maal wʊ naa ka a wʊ pʊɔ pɛl a sɩ ir yɩ yin wõm pɔ.” 15A sojasɩ den a libie tɩ na ba ɩ a lɛ ban 'yɛr ɩka ba ɩ. A Juu nɩbɛ ma chɛnɛ na 'yɛr a yele nyãna a dɩna.
16A poturbo pie nɩ bʊ̃'yen chen a Galilee a tɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ju a Yesu na wiil ba ɩka ba do. 17Ban wa nyɛ wʊ, ba gbur dumo na ba puor wʊ tɩchɛ ka bamɩne chɛnɛ baala. 18Ka a Yesu wa 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A n Sãa den a kpãɛn ala a jaa na be a saaju, nɩ a kpãɛn ala a jaa na be a wɛr pɔ kʊ ma. 19A lɛ jũu, yɩ yɔ a wɛr wʊ jaa na yɩ tɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ paalsɩ ka ba wa turo ma, na yɩ suoro ba a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ, a Sãa yuor, nɩ a Bie yuor, nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ yuor 'yɔ̃ɔ, 20tɩ na yɩ wile ba ka ba sɔɔ de, tɩ turo bon jaa ɩn 'yɛr kʊ yɩ. Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka ɩn ma ben a yɩ sɛ̃ sɔ̃ɔ jaa, tɩ tãn a wɛr baarfʊ daar.”

Title: MAAKƖ 1
Content:
1Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ pielfʊ.
2'Yɛ'yɛrɛ kɔ̃ɔ yuor na di Isaiya sɛb naa, “Nyɛ, ɩn tʊ̃ naa a n tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ ka wʊ de nie tɩ chɔɔr a sɔr kʊ fʊ.” (Malakaɩ 3:1) 3“Kɔkɔr tãna naa a dãlpʊɔ ju, ‘Chɔɔr a sɔr kʊ a sɩ Soro na fʊ maal a wʊ sɔr ka wʊ tor.’ ” (Isaiya 40:3)
4Lɛ lɛ a Jɔɔn wa, na wʊ wa suoro a nɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ be a dãlpʊɔ ju, na wʊ mʊɔl 'yɛr, “Yɩ lɩɛb yi a yɩ tɩɛr dɛɛr pɔ so a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ, ka wʊ vɛ̃ a yelbebe kʊ yɩ.” 5Ka a nɩbɛ yire a tẽn ala a jaa na be a Judiya wɛr pɔ, ka a bamɩne mɩ yire a Jerusalɛm. Ba chire naa a ba pʊʊr 'yɛrɛ a ba yelbebe kʊrɔ wʊ tɩchɛ ka wʊ suoro ba jaa a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ a Jordan man pɔ. 6Nyɔɔma kɔɔlʊ fuu lɛ Jɔɔn ma su tɩ de gãn lũn a sɩɛ. Soor nɩ sɩkãa lɛ ɩ a wʊ bʊ̃diir. 7Wʊ 'yɛr naa, “N puor sʊɔ ben be, na wʊ gar ma. A wʊ nafɔɔr mibe gba n ba sɛɛ ɩka n guun for ɛ. 8Maa suoro yɩ naa nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ tɩchɛ 'lɔ na so yɩ naa nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ.”
9A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ Yesu yi naa Najaretɩ na be a Galilee wɛr pɔ wa, ka a Jɔɔn so wʊ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ a Jordan man pɔ. 10A Yesu na wa yire a kʊ̃ɔ pɔ, wʊ nyɛ naa a saaju na tɔɔ yuo ka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ wa suro fɩka papa wa kpɛ a Yesu pɔ. 11Tɩ a kɔkɔr yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ 'yɛrɛ, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a n binʊ̃nãa, ka a n 'yɔ̃ɔ ma 'maa nɩ fʊ.”
12Ka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ de wʊ fɔɔ jaa chiin a dãlpʊɔ ju, 13ka wʊ tɩ be be ber lɩjaayi ka a Satan bɛɛr wʊ kaa. 'Lɔ nɩ a mɔdʊ̃n lɛ dɔ̃ɔ be be, ka a malakasɩ wa sʊ̃nɔ̃ wʊ.
14Jɔɔn ban wa nyɔɔ pɔɔ baar, Yesu chen naa a Galilee na wʊ tɩ mʊɔlɔ 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ. 15Wʊ 'yɛr naa, “A sɔ̃ɔ ta naa ka a Nãaŋmɩn di a wʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ. Yɩ lɩɛb yi a tɩɛr dɛɛr pɔ na yɩ sɔɔ de a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ.”
16A lɛ a Yesu na wa de a Galilee man lana, wʊ nyɛ naa Simon nɩ a wʊ yɛbile Andiru ka ba lɔɔrɔ lɔyaar, jãnyɔɔrbɔ lɛ ba ɩ, 17ka wʊ bʊɔl ba, “Yɩ wa turo ma, ka n lɩɛb yɩ ka yɩ nyɔɔrɔ nɩbɛ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ.” 18Ka ba tɔ̃ɔ tɩɛ a jãmɛ nyɔɔrfʊ bar tɩ turo wʊ.
19Wʊn wa chen a niem bãlãa, wʊ nyɛ naa Jemesɩ nɩ Jɔɔn, Jebedee bibiir, a ba be a gboro pɔ chɔɔrɔ a lɔyaarsɩ. 20Wʊn wa nyɛ ba, wʊ bʊɔl ba naa, ka ba bar a ba sãa nɩ a gboro nɩ a bala ban yara tɩ turo a Yesu.
21Be lɛ ba wa chen a Kapenahum ka a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir wa ta, ka a Yesu chen tɩ kpɛ a lɔ̃ɔfʊ jie tɩ piel wile. 22A nɩbɛ nɛɛr 'maa naa nɩ a wʊ wiilfʊ, bojũu wʊ wile ba naa nɩ Nãaŋmɩn sɔr. Waa ɩ fɩka a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe ɛ. 23A sɩdɛɛr sʊɔ kɔ̃ɔ mɩ chen tɩ kpɛ a ba lɔ̃ɔfʊ jie tãna 'yɛrɛ nɩ, 24“Bãa lɛ a fʊ̃ʊ Yesu na yi a Najaretɩ bʊɔrɔ a sɩ sɛ̃? Fʊ wa naa ɩka fʊ wa sɔ̃ɔ sɩ bar bɩɩ? N bɔ̃ɔ naa a nɩrɛ 'lɔ fʊn ɩ, fʊ ɩ naa a chɛchɛ 'lɔ na yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃!”
25Ka a Yesu tãn wʊ, “Pɔɔ a fʊ nɛɛ tɩ wa yi a daba pɔ!” 26Ka a sɩdɛɛr daa a daba lɔb tẽe nɩtãa kpũgul loro tɩ ŋme chɛlma tɩ wa yi a daba pɔ.
27Ka a nɛɛr 'maa a nɩbɛ ka ba lɩɛb sʊrɔ taa, “Bo lɛ? Wiil paal bo mɩ nɩ nyã, na tara kpɛ̃ɔ lɛ! Wʊ ma 'yɛr 'yɛr, ka a sɩdɛbɛ ma tu a wʊ nɛɛ.” 28Ka a wʊ yele yaar a Galilee wɛr wʊ jaa.
29Ban wa yi a lɔ̃ɔfʊ jie, 'lɔ nɩ Jemesɩ nɩ Jɔɔn chen naa a Simon nɩ Andiru yir, 30ka a ãgãn tɔ a Simon dãɛ pɔɔ ka ba 'yɛr kʊ a Yesu. 31Yesu kpɛ naa a wʊ sɛ̃ tɩ nyɔɔ a wʊ nũu sʊ̃ʊ wʊ ka wʊ ir. A ãgãn tʊl baar wʊ, ka wʊ ir maal bʊ̃diir kʊ ba.
32A jãanʊɔr 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ na wa mʊr, a nɩbɛ waan na baalsɩ nɩ a bala a sɩdɛbɛ na tara a Yesu sɛ̃. 33Ka a tẽe nɩbɛ ba jaa wa lɔ̃ɔ a dɔ̃dɔ̃rʊ, 34ka a Yesu sãa nɩyɔɔ na tara baal jaa bʊrɔ. Wʊ mɩ dii naa a sɩdɛbɛ yɔɔ ka a yi, tɩ maa sɔɔ ka a sɩdɛbɛ 'yɛr 'yɛr ɛ, bojũu ba bɔ̃ɔ naa a nɩrɛ 'lɔ wʊn ɩ.
35A wɛr na chaara a bibio pipi tɩ chɛnɛ sɔb, Yesu ir na wʊ yi a yir na wʊ chen a jie ãsʊɔ ɩka wʊ tɩ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn. 36Simon nɩ a wʊ taaba mɩ yin bʊɔrɔ wʊ na ba wa nyɛ wʊ, 37na ba 'yɛr, “Nɩbɛ ba jaa yʊɔrɔ na bʊɔrɔ fʊ!”
38Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Yɩ ɩ ka sɩ chen jiyuo, a tẽn anyã na gbʊr, ka n tɩ mʊɔl 'yɛr a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr a be, ala 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ n wa.” 39Wʊ yɔ naa a Galilee wɛr wʊ jaa na wʊ 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr a ba lɔ̃ɔfʊ yie pɔ tɩ na wʊ dire a sɩdɛbɛ mɩ ka a yire.
40Ka a daba ãsʊɔ mɩ na ɩ kɔ̃kɔ̃mɔ̃ wa gbur dumo sʊɔr wʊ, “Fʊ̃ʊ sɔɔ, sãa ma.”
41Ka nɩbaal kpɛ a Yesu ka wʊ tur a wʊ nũu sɩɩr a daba tɩ 'yɛr, “N sɔɔ naa. Sa!” 42Ajienaa ka a kɔ̃kɔ̃mɔ̃ sa.
43Yesu kpãa wʊ naa kpãkpãan wʊ ɩka, 44“Taa ɩrɛ wa 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ nɩrɛ ɛ. Chen tɩ wiil a fʊ mãɛ kʊ a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrloro tɩ ir a nɛɛ 'lɔ a Mosesɩ na 'yɛr ka a ɩ dãasɩɛ.” 45Tɩchɛ a daba na wa yi wʊ piel naa na wʊ ŋme a Yesu yele yaar, ka a lɛ jũu Yesu ba lɛ tʊ̃ɔ yʊɔrɔ chãa pɔ a tẽe pɔ ɛ. Wʊ ma be naa a tẽe kõkoor, a nɩbɛ chɛnɛ yire jiir jaa waara a wʊ sɛ̃.

Title: MAAKƖ 2
Content:
1A anyã puor, Yesu lɩɛb wa a Kapenahum, ka nɩbɛ wõ ka wʊ be naa a yir. 2Nɩyɔɔ wan wa duo na ba sɛɛ a die wa tɩ yin a yõo. Ka wa 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr kʊrɔ ba. 3Be lɛ ka daba ãsʊɔ mɩ bɩɛrɛ, a wʊ nuur nɩ a wʊ gbɛɛ kpi naa, ka nɩbɛ anaar jɛ̃jɛl wʊ na ba waan a Yesu sɛ̃. 4Ka ba wa ta, ka jie ba be be a ba na tu kpɛ̃n a be a Yesu na be ɛ, a nɩyɔɔ jũu. Be lɛ ba do a gar ju na ba tɩ ŋmaa puo a jie 'lɔ a Yesu na ara, tɩ na ba de a daba nɩ a fɔbaa 'lɔ ban 'mɔɔn wʊ waan tur bar ka wʊ suu tɩ gã a Yesu niem. 5Be lɛ a Yesu na wa nyɛ a lɛ ban sɔɔ de wʊ, wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a dabaala, “N bie, n vɛ̃ naa fʊ yelbebe bar.”
6Ka be lɛ ka a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe bamɩne na be be tɩɛrɛ, 7“Ka nyɛ daba na ara fere na wʊ sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Nãaŋmɩn yuor tɛɛ. An lɛ na tʊ̃ɔ nɩrɛ yelbebe vɛ̃ bar, ka Nãaŋmɩn tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ?”
8Ajienaa Yesu bɔ̃ɔn naa a lɛ ban tɩɛrɛ a ba pʊʊr pɔ, ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Bãa lɛ yɩ tɩɛrɛ a lɛ a yɩ pʊʊr pɔ? 9Buor sʊɔ lɛ ɩ kɔ̃mɔ̃kɔ̃mɔ̃, n 'yɛr ɩka n vɛ̃ naa wʊ yelbebe bar, bɩɩ, n 'yɛr ɩka a daba nyã wʊ ir, 'mɔɔ a wʊ bʊ̃gãnaa, na wʊ kulo nɩ? 10N bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a Nɩsaal Bie tara naa kpɛ̃ɔ a wɛr pɔ na vɛ̃ nɩrɛ yelbebe kʊ wʊ.” Be lɛ wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a daba 'lɔ nuur nɩ a gbɛɛ na kpi, 11“Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ, ir, na fʊ 'mɔɔ a bʊ̃gãnaa, na fʊ kulo nɩ.” 12Be lɛ, ka wʊ vaa ir 'mɔɔ a bʊ̃gãnaa yin a nɩbɛ ba jaa niem. Nɛɛr 'maa ba naa ka ba dãna Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrɛ, “Saa dɔ̃ɔ nyɛ a lɛ ɛ.”
13Yesu lɩɛb chen a man nɛɛ ka nɩyɔɔ wa a wʊ sɛ̃ ka wʊ wile ba. 14A Yesu na wa chiine wʊ nyɛ naa a Alfayasɩ bie, Levi, ka wʊ jãnɛ a lõpo defʊ jie, ka Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Ir turo ma,” ka wʊ ir turo wʊ.
15A lõpodierbe nɩ a yelbetʊ̃nbɔ yɔɔ turo naa a Yesu, ka 'lɔ nɩ a bamɩne nɩ a wʊ poturbo 'mataa dire a Levi yir. 16A Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe na ɩ a Faraseemɩne nyɛ a lɛ wʊn jãnɛ nɩ a lõpodierbe nɩ a yelbetʊ̃nbɔ 'mataa dire, ka ba sʊʊr a wʊ poturbo, “Bãa lɛ so a daba nyã na 'mataa dire nɩ a lõpodierbe nɩ a yelbetʊ̃nbɔ?”
17Yesu wõ naa a lɛ ban 'yɛr, ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Nɩrɛ na kpɛ̃mɛ waa chiine tɩtɩlɛ jie ɛ. Baalaa lɛ ma chen. N ba wa ɩka n wa bʊɔl a nɩtorsɩ ɛ. N wa naa ɩka n wa bʊɔl a yelbebe tʊ̃nbɔ ka ba wa lɩɛb a tɩɛr.”
18Jɔɔn poturbo nɩ a Faraseemɩne nɩbɛ gal kɔ̃, ka nɩbɛ wa sʊʊr a Yesu, “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a Jɔɔn poturbo nɩ a Farasee poturbo ma gal kɔ̃, tɩchɛ ka a fʊ̃ʊ poturbo maa gal kɔ̃ ɛ?”
19A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ an ɩ ka nɩbɛ be a pɔɔ paalaa sɩrɛ jie tɩ tʊ̃ɔ kɔ̃ gal? Wʊn chɛnɛ be a ba sɛ̃, ba kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ ɛ. 20A daar 'lɔ ban wa de a pɔɔ paalaa sɩrɛ, ban gal a kɔ̃.
21“Nɩrɛ maa ŋmaa fɔpaalaa sɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ fɔkoraa pɔ ɛ. 'Lɔ be sɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ a lɛ, a fɔpaalaa na tɔɔ naa a fɔkoraa chɩɛr. 22Nɩrɛ maa de dãbãɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ wɔkoraa pɔ ɛ. 'Lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ, a wʊɔ na pur naa, ka a dãa nɩ a wʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ. Wʊ ma 'yɔ̃ɔ naa dãbãɩn wɔpaalaa pɔ.”
23A Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar, Yesu nɩ a wʊ poturbo kpɛ̃n tala puo sãlsɔɔ, ka a wʊ poturbo piel fɔrɔ a bʊ̃bie. 24Ka a Faraseemɩne 'yɛr kʊ a Yesu, “Nyɛ lɛ a fʊ poturbo na ɩrɛ. Bo lɛ so ka ba tʊ̃nɔ̃ a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir? A ba tara sɔr ɛ.”
25Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yaa bɔ̃ɔ a par a lɛ yɩn kar kaa a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ a nãa David nɩ a wʊ nɩbɛ na ba dɔ̃ɔ tara bon na di ɛ! 26A ber ala pɔ Abiyata lɛ ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, kɔ̃ dɔ̃ɔ kpɛ ba, ka wʊ kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn yir, ka a Abiyata de a paanʊ̃ɔ ala ban bin kʊ Nãaŋmɩn kʊ wʊ, ka wʊ 'wɔb. A paanʊ̃ɔ ala a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlorbo tɛɛ lɛ ma 'wɔb, a ba tara sɔr ɩka nɩyuo wʊ 'wɔb ɛ, tɩchɛ ka David 'wɔb tɩ de kʊ a bala na be a wʊ sɛ̃, ka ba mɩ 'wɔb.”
27Be lɛ ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir ben be a nɩbɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ, a ba ɩ a nɩbɛ ben be a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ. 28Ala lɛ so ka a Nɩsaal Bie ɩ a Soro lɔ̃ɔn a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir gba.”

Title: MAAKƖ 3
Content:
1Sɔ̃ɔ ãsʊɔ go Yesu chen tɩ kpɛ a lɔ̃ɔfʊ jie, ka a daba kɔ̃ɔ mɩ be be ka a wʊ nũpɛl kpi. 2Ka a nɩbɛ bamɩne na be be bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba gar a Yesu, be lɛ ba tɔɔ gbʊr kaara wʊ. Ka wʊn sãa naa a daba nũu baal a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir bɩɩ. 3Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a daba nũpɛl na kpi, “Ir ara a sɩ jaa nyɛ fʊ.”
4Be lɛ ka a Yesu sʊʊr ba, “Tʊ̃buor sʊɔ lɛ tara sɔr a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir daar ɩka fʊ tʊ̃, a fʊ maal vɩla bɩɩ dɛɛr, fʊ faa nyɛvʊr bɩɩ fʊ kʊ wʊ?” Ka ba ɩ jaa gbulo gbulo.
5Wʊ kaa naa ba jaa gʊɔr nɩ suur, ka a wʊ pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ a ba bachɛlfʊ jũu. Wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a daba 'lɔ nũpɛl na kpi, “Tur a fʊ nũu.” Wʊ tur naa ka a nũpɛl wʊ jaa sa. 6Be lɛ ka a Faraseemɩne yi chen a Hɛrɔd nɩbɛ sɛ̃, a ba tɩ 'mataa guoro a Yesu, bʊɔrɔ sɔr 'lɔ ban na tu kʊ wʊ.
7Yesu nɩ a wʊ poturbo yin chen a man pɔ ka a nɩyɔɔ na yi Galilee wɛr tu ba. 8Nɩyɔyɔɔ mɩ yi naa Judiya wɛr, Jerusalɛm, Idumea wɛr nɩ a Jordan man gɔ̃ɔn, nɩ a tẽn na be Tire nɩ Sidon wɛr pɔ, wa a wʊ sɛ̃ bojũu ba wõ naa a lɛ jaa wʊn tʊ̃. 9A nɩyɔɔ jũu, Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ poturbo, “Yɩ kaa nyɛ gboro kʊ ma ka n sɛr bãlãa.” Wʊ 'yɛr naa a lɛ bojũu waa bʊɔrɔ ɩka a nɩbɛ ba mɩl pɔɔ wʊ ɛ. 10A nɩbɛ yɔɔ wʊn sãa lɛ so, a baalsɩ dara taa bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba sɩɩr wʊ. 11A sɩdɛbɛ na ma wa nyɛ a Yesu ba ma da naa a nɩrɛ 'lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ ban be lɔb tẽe tɩ tãna 'yɛrɛ nɩ, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie!” 12Tɩchɛ wʊ kpaal ban jũu, ka ba taa ɩrɛ wa 'yɛrɛ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ wʊn ɩ ɛ.
13Yesu do naa a tɔ̃ɔ ju tɩ bʊɔl a bala wʊn bʊɔrɔ ka ba do wa a wʊ sɛ̃. 14A ba pɔ lɛ wʊ kaa ir pie nɩ ayi, bʊɔlɔ ba nɩtʊ̃nsɩ, ka ba na be a wʊ sɛ̃, ka wʊ ma tʊ̃ ba ka ba chen tɩ mʊɔl 'yɛr a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr, 15tɩ tara kpɛ̃ɔ dire nɩ sɩdɛbɛ ka a yire. 16A nɩbɛ pie nɩ ayi bala wʊn ir yoe lɛ a anyã. Simon, wʊn lɛ kʊ wʊ yopaalaa Pita. 17Jemesɩ, nɩ a wʊ yɛbile Jɔɔn, a ba sãa yuor lɛ Jebedee, wʊ bʊɔlɔ ba naa Bɔɔnɛgasɩ, a par lɛ sa tãna bibiir. 18Andiru, Filip, Batolomi, Matiu, Tomasɩ, Jemesɩ na ɩ Alfayasɩ bidaba, Tadius, Simon na mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a wʊ wɛr yele, 19nɩ a Judas Isɩkariyot, 'lɔ lɛ na wa de a Yesu tɩr.
20A Yesu na lɩɛb wa a yir, nɩyɔɔ wa naa wa lɔ̃ɔ go, ka 'lɔ nɩ a wʊ poturbo ba tara jaa gba na di ɛ. 21Be lɛ a wʊ yir dẽme na wa wõ a lɛ, ba chen naa ɩka ba tɩ ka wʊ, bojũu ba 'yɛr naa ɩka, “Burbur kpɛ wʊ naa.”
22Ka a Mosesɩ Nɛɛr wiwiilbe bamɩne na yi a Jerusalɛm mɩ 'yɛrɛ, “A Beeljebul, lɛ pɔb wʊ! A sɩdɛbɛ nãa lɛ wʊ ma de dire nɩ a sɩdɛbɛ ka a yire.”
23Yesu bʊɔl naa a nɩbɛ na wʊ lɔb sʊkpar kʊ ba, “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a Satan na ɩ lɛ dii a Satan? 24Ala ɩ nãa ir jɛɛrɛ nɩ a wʊ mãɛ nãalʊ̃ʊ, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ wʊn ɩ ara? 25Yir nɩbɛ mɩ ir jɛɛrɛ taa, a yir 'lɔ nɩbɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'mataa kpɛ ɛ. 26Ala ɩ a Satan ir naa na wʊ jɛɛrɛ nɩ a wʊ mãɛ, wʊ mɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ ara ɛ, a wʊ baaraa lɛ. 27Yelmãɛ, nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ kpɛ gãdaa yir tɩ ju a wʊ bonsɩ ka waa de nie lũ wʊ ɛ. 'Lɔ wa lũ wʊ a lɛ wa baar, wʊn pãa tʊ̃ɔ naa a wʊ yir bonsɩ ju. 28Sɩrɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, yeldɛbɛ nɩ ferfʊ a jaa nɩbɛ na fere sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn yuor ban nyɛn vɛ̃ kʊfʊ. 29Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na fere nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kʊ̃ nyɛ vɛ̃ kʊfʊ ɛ, bojũu wʊ lo naa a yeldɛɛr 'lɔ pɔ, na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.”
30Ban 'yɛr ɩka wʊ tara naa a sɩdɛɛr lɛ so ka wʊ 'yɛr a lɛ.
31Be lɛ ka a Yesu ma nɩ a wʊ yɛɛr wa. Ba ara naa a yõo tɩ tʊ̃ nɩrɛ ka wʊ bʊɔl wʊ. 32Nɩyɔɔ jãnɛ naa jilʊ̃ a Yesu tɩ ba 'yɛr wʊ, “A fʊ ma nɩ a fʊ yɛɛr be naa a yõo bʊɔrɔ fʊ.”
33Ka wʊ sʊʊr ba, “An lɛ ɩ a n ma nɩ a n yɛɛr?”
34Be lɛ wʊ kaa a bala na jãnɛ jilʊ̃ wʊ tɩ 'yɛr, “Banyã lɛ ɩ a n ma nɩ a n yɛɛr! 35Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na turo a Nãaŋmɩn sɔr, 'lɔ lɛ a n yɛbɛ nɩ a n yɛpɔɔ nɩ a n ma.”

Title: MAAKƖ 4
Content:
1Sɔ̃ɔ kɔ̃ɔ go, Yesu piel wile a man nɛɛ. A nɩyɔyɔɔ na wa lɔ̃ɔ jũu, wʊ kpɛ naa a gboro pɔ jãnɛ, tɩchɛ ka a nɩbɛ ara kɔɔ a kʊ̃ɔ nɛɛ. 2Sʊkpar lɛ wʊ lɔɔrɔ wile nɩ ba yelyɔɔ, sʊkpa ãsʊɔ nɩ nyã: 3“Yɩ chɛlɛ! Kʊɔraa lɛ yi chen ɩka wʊ tɩ yaar a wʊ bʊ̃bʊrɔ. 4Wʊ yaar naa ka amɩne lo a sɔr pɔ ka a lubil wa tuur di. 5Ka amɩne mɩ lo a jie 'lɔ a kʊsɩbɛ na waa gar a tãna, na a bul fɔɔ, a tãna na ba tɩrɛ jũu. 6Tɩchɛ a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ na wa nyãa, a jʊɔl naa na a kpi, bojũu a ba tara nyɩbɛ ɛ. 7Amɩne mɩ tɩ lo naa gʊʊr pɔ, tɩchɛ ka a gʊʊr bul fãɩn naa tara, a ba tʊ̃ɔ dɔɔ ɛ. 8Ka amɩne mɩ tɩ lo a kɔjɔ̃ vɩla pɔ, na a dɔɔ yɔɔ. Ka amɩne dɔɔ a lɩjɛr nɩ pie, amɩne lɩjaata ka amɩne mɩ kɔbaa.”
9Ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Nɩrɛ jaa na tara toor, wʊ chɛlɛ!”
10A nɩyɔyɔɔ bala na wa chen tɩ chɛ a nɩbɛ bala na turo wʊ nɩ a wʊ poturbo pie nɩ a ayi bala wʊn ir, ka a ba sʊʊr wʊ a sʊkpar par. 11Be lɛ ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩn 'lɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊ yɩ naa a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ yelsɔɔlaa, tɩchɛ a banyã 'lɔ na ba pʊɔ ɛ, a yelsɩ a jaa ɩ naa sʊkpar kʊ ba. 12A lɛ jũu, ‘Ba ma kãan lɛ̃ɛɛ tɩ ba maa nyɛ ɛ, na ba ma chɛl lɛ̃ɛɛ tɩ ba maa wõ ɛ. Ala ba ɩ lɛ ɛ ban lɩɛb a ba tɩɛr ka Nãaŋmɩn vɛ̃ kʊ ba.’ ” (Isaiya 6:9, 10)
13Ka Yesu sʊʊr ba, “Yaa bɔ̃ɔ a sʊkpa nyã par ɛ? Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ yɩn ɩ wa bɔ̃ɔ sʊkpa jaa par? 14Yɩ kaa, a kʊɔraa lɛ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na yaara a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr. 15Nɩbɛ bamɩne kaara naa fɩka a bʊ̃bie ala ban yaar ka a lo a sɔr pɔ. Bala wa wõ a 'yɛr wa baar, a Satan ma wa naa, wa de a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbir ban bʊr a ba nyãa pɔ. 16Ala mɩ na lo a jie 'lɔ a kʊsɩbɛ na waa gar a tãna ɩ naa a bala na wõ a 'yɛr na ba ma sɔɔ de fɔɔ jaa nɩ pʊpɛl, 17tɩchɛ baa tara nyɩbɛ ɛ, ba maa kor ɛ. A 'yɛr jũu, wõm bɩɩ gefʊ wa wa a ba sɛ̃, ba ma lɩɛb puor fɔɔ jaa. 18A ala mɩ na lo a gʊʊr pɔ ɩ naa a bala na wõ a 'yɛr, 19tɩchɛ ka a ãgãn nyã wõm, nɩ a bʊ̃tarsɩ bɛlfʊ, nɩ a bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ fãɩn a 'yɛr, ka waa tʊ̃ɔ dɔɔ ɛ. 20A anyã mɩ na lo a kɔjɔ̃ pɔ ɩ naa a bala na wõ a 'yɛr na ba sɔɔ de na ba dɔɔ jur, ka amɩne ɩ lɩjɛr nɩ pie, amɩne lɩjaata, amɩne mɩ kɔbaa.”
21Wʊ sʊʊr ba naa, “Ba ma chʊm fãtɩn na ba de laa kpa pɔɔ bɩɩ de su gado pĩlem bɩɩ? A ba ɩ a jie 'lɔ wʊn na chaar nɩrɛ jaa lɛ ba ma dɔɔl ɛ? 22Bon jaa na pɔɔ ban yuo wʊ naa, ka ala a jaa mɩ na sɔɔl yi chãa pɔ. 23Nɩrɛ jaa na tara toor, wʊ chɛlɛ!”
24Ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ bɔ̃ɔ chɛlɛ sʊ̃ a lɛ yɩn wõnõ. A lɛ fʊn man tɩr, lɛ mɩ lɛ ban man kʊ fʊ, tɩ dɔɔl gba. 25Nɩrɛ jaa na tara, Nãaŋmɩn ma vɛ̃ naa ka wʊ nyɛrɛ dɔɔlɔ, nɩrɛ nyã mɩ na ba tara ɛ, a bãlãa ala gba wʊn tara, Nãaŋmɩn na de naa a wʊ sɛ̃.”
26Tɩ lɛ bɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ nɩtɔ̃ lɛ wʊ kaara. Daba ma yaar a wʊ bʊ̃bʊrɔ bar. 27Tãsɔɔ nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ, ka wʊ gãn bɩɩ wʊ ir naa, a bʊ̃bie ma bulaa naa nʊ̃ɔ, tɩchɛ a wʊ mãɛ gba maa bɔ̃ɔ ɛ. 28A bʊ̃bie ma bul naa a tẽe naa tɔ vaar tɩ dɔɔ jur, bɩ a bie. 29Ala wa bɩ baar, wʊ ma chiin nɩ sʊɔ tɩ ŋman bojũu a ŋmab sɔ̃ɔ ta naa.”
30Ka Yesu lɛ 'yɛr, “Bo lɛ sɩn de man a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ bɩɩ sʊkpa buor lɛ sɩn lɔb gbɛb wʊ? 31Wʊ kaara fɩka a kɔ̃kɔ̃ɔ bir, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a bʊ̃bie a jaa pɔ bʊ̃bile. 32Tɩchɛ wʊ ma bul ɩ tɩkpɛ̃ɛ na wʊ tɛ wilbɛrɛ, ka a lubil ma wa mara a wʊ 'maar pɔ.”
33Yesu de naa sʊkpayɔɔ na nyɛtaa na wʊ 'yɛr a 'yɛr kʊ ba, a lɛ an na ɩ ka ba tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a par. 34Sʊkpar tɛɛ lɛ wʊ ma de 'yɛrɛ nɩ a 'yɛr kʊrɔ ba. Tɩchɛ ala wa ɩ 'lɔ nɩ a wʊ poturbo tɛɛ lɛ, wʊ ma wiil naa a jaa par kʊ ba.
35A daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ jãanʊɔr, wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ poturbo, “Yɩ ɩ a sɩ gɔ̃ɔ chen a man gɔ̃ɔn.” 36Ba bar naa a nɩyɔyɔɔ bala tɩchɛ ka a wʊ poturbo tara wʊ, ka ba 'matãan a gborsɩ amɩne gɔ̃ɔnɔ̃. 37Ka a man kʊ̃ɔ sɛkpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ ire ka a kʊ̃ɔ kpɛ a gboro pɔ ɩrɛ na sɛɛ 38tɩchɛ ka a Yesu be a gboro par gã kɔɔl wʊ ju guro. Ka a wʊ poturbo sãɩ wʊ na ba sʊrɔ wʊ, “Wiwile, a ba bã fʊ sɩn mʊrɔ bɩɩ?”
39Be lɛ ka wʊ ir tãn a sɛsɛbɛ nɩ a man, “Yɩ ŋmaa vʊʊr! Yɩ ara a lɛ nɛ!” Ka a sɛsɛbɛ ŋmaa vʊʊr ka a man ara jomm.
40Ka wʊ sʊʊr a wʊ poturbo, “Bo lɛ so ka yɩ joro a dãbãɛ? Yɩ chɛnɛ na ba sɔɔ ma bɩɩ?”
41Ka a dãbãɛ kpɛ ba ka ba lɩɛb sʊrɔ taa, “An lɛ a nyã ka a sɛsɛbɛ nɩ a man tu a wʊ nɛɛ?”

Title: MAAKƖ 5
Content:
1Yesu nɩ a wʊ poturbo gɔ̃ɔ naa a man, a Gerasenɩ nɩbɛ wɛr pɔ. 2Yesu na wa yi a gboro pɔ, daba na gele yi naa a yar par wa tuor wʊ. 3A gẽgelaa nyã kpɩɛrɛ naa a yar par ka nɩrɛ jaa ba be be na tʊ̃ɔ lũ wʊ nɩ bɔ̃jɔrsɩ gba ɛ. 4Ba ma lũ naa a wʊ gbɛɛ nɩ a nuur tɩchɛ ka wʊ ŋma, tɩ kar a kue ala bar. Nɩrɛ jaa ba be be na tʊ̃ɔ wʊ ɛ. 5Tãsɔɔ nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ, wʊ ma be naa a yar par nɩ a tɔ̃n ju tãna tɩ ŋmara a wʊ mãɛ nɩ kʊsɩbɛ.
6Wʊn wa nyɛ a Yesu na be tɛɛr, wʊ jo naa tɩ lo gbur dumo a wʊ niem, 7tɩ na wʊ ŋme chɛlma 'yɛrɛ, “Bo fʊ bʊɔrɔ ɩka fʊ ɩ ma? Fʊ ɩ naa a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na gar a jaa Bie pɔn Nãaŋmɩn ɩka fʊ kʊ̃ ge ma ɛ.” 8Bojũu Yesu dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ wʊ ɩka, “A fʊ̃ʊ sɩdɛɛr wa yi a daba pɔ.”
9Be lɛ ka Yesu sʊʊr wʊ, “Bãa a fʊ yuor di?” Ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Sɩyɔɔ, bojũu sɩ waa naa.” 10Ka wʊ sʊɔr a Yesu yãayãabɩlɛ ɩka wʊ ta dii wʊ bar a jie 'lɔ ɛ.
11Doyɔɔ mɩ ara na gbʊr a tɔ̃ɔ, dire. 12Ka a sɩdɛbɛ sʊɔr a Yesu, “Ir sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a dor ala pɔ na fʊ sɔɔ ka sɩ tɩ kpɛ a ba pɔ.” 13Wʊ sɔɔ naa ka a sɩdɛbɛ yi tɩ kpɛ a dor ala. A ɩ naa dor tur ayi (2,000) ka a jaa tĩgbil suu tɩ kpɛ a man pɔ gbʊ̃m kpi kpi.
14A bala na kaara a dor jon kul a tẽe pɔ nɩ a tẽbil ala na gbʊr tɩ 'yɛr a lɛ na ɩ. Ka a nɩbɛ yi chen ɩka ba tɩ kaa. 15Ba wa naa a Yesu sɛ̃ wa nyɛ a daba 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ tara a sɩdɛyɔɔ gele ka wʊ chɩ su bonsɩ jãnɛ, ka a dãbãɛ kpɛ ba. 16A bala na nyɛ 'yɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ a lɛ na ɩ a daba na dɔ̃ɔ tara a sɩdɛbɛ nɩ a dor 'yɛr, 17ka a nɩbɛ piel sʊɔrɔ a Yesu ka wʊ yi a ba wɛr pɔ.
18Yesu na wa kpɩɛrɛ a gboro pɔ ka a daba 'lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ a sɩdɛbɛ na yi sʊɔr wʊ ɩka wʊ ɩ a ba 'mataa chen. 19Ka a Yesu ba sɔɔ ɛ, tɩ 'yɛr wʊ, “Kul a fʊ yir dẽme sɛ̃ tɩ 'yɛr kʊ ba a lɛ a Soro na ɩ kʊ fʊ, nɩ a lɛ wʊn jo a fʊ nɩbaal.” 20A daba chen na wʊ tɩ piel 'yɛrɛ a lɛ a Yesu na maal kʊ wʊ a wɛr 'lɔ pɔ ban bʊɔlɔ a Dekapolisɩ. Ka a nɛɛr 'maa a nɩbɛ.
21Yesu na wa gɔ̃ɔ a man gɔ̃ɔn go, nɩyɔyɔɔ lɔ̃ɔ naa na ba jilʊ̃ wʊ. Wʊ chɛnɛ na ara a man nɛɛ, 22ka a ba lɔ̃ɔfʊ jie nɩkpɛ̃ɛ ãsʊɔ ban bʊɔlɔ Jairusɩ wa a be. Wʊn wa nyɛ a Yesu, 23wʊ gbur dumo a Yesu niem tɩ sʊɔr wʊ, “Yãayãabɩlɛ, a n bipɔɔbile lɛ ɩ baal ɩrɛ na kpi. Wa dɔɔl wʊ a fʊ nũu ka wʊ sa ta kpi ɛ.” 24Ka a Yesu nɩ a daba 'mataa chiine. Nɩyɔyɔɔ turo naa dara taa tɩɛrɛ wʊ.
25Pɔɔ kɔ̃ɔ mɩ ben be lo sɩɛ suoro faara yuomo pie nɩ ayi. 26Wʊ bal di dɔɔyɛ yɔɔ a tɩtɩɩlbɛ jie na wʊ sɔ̃ɔ bon jaa wʊn tara tɩ ba sa ɛ. Ka a baal tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ wʊ. 27Wʊn wa wõ a Yesu yele, wʊ tu naa a puor tɩ sɩɩr a wʊ fuu, 28bojũu wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ mãɛ. “Maa tʊ̃ɔ sɩɩr a wʊ fuu gba, ɩn sa naa, na n pɛ̃n.” 29Wʊn wa sɩɩr a Yesu fuu nɛɛ wa baar, a jãɩ ŋmaa naa a dẽdẽe daa ka wʊ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a wʊ wʊʊr baar naa.
30Ka a Yesu mɩ bɔ̃ɔn a fɔɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ a kpɛ̃ɔ na yi a wʊ sɛ̃. Ka a wʊ lɩɛb a nɩyɔɔ bala pɔ sʊʊr, “An lɛ sɩɩr a n fuu?”
31Ka a wʊ poturbo 'yɛr, “Nyɛ a lɛ a nɩyɔyɔɔ banyã na dara taa tɩɛrɛ fʊ, tɩchɛ a fʊ sʊrɔ a sʊɔ 'lɔ na sɩɩr fʊ!”
32Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu chɛnɛ kaara gʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ nyɛ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sɩɩr wʊ. 33Ka a pɔɔ na bɔ̃ɔn a lɛ na ɩ, dãbãɛ kpɛ wʊ naa ka wʊ mɩrɛ na wʊ wa gbur dumo a Yesu niem tɩ 'yɛr a lɛ jaa na ɩ. 34Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “N yɛpɔɔ, fʊn sɔɔ ma jũu, fʊ sa naa. Kulo nɩ ãgãn 'maar, a fʊ dɔɔyɛ baar naa.”
35A Yesu ba 'yɛr baar ɛ, tɩchɛ nɩbɛ kɔ̃ɔ yi a Jairusɩ yir wa 'yɛr wʊ, “A fʊ bie kpi naa. Bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ fʊ dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a wiwile go?”
36Yesu ba chɛlɛ a lɛ ban 'yɛrɛ ɛ, tɩ na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a daba, “Taa joro dãbãɛ ɛ. Sɔɔ ma dɛ.”
37Yesu ba sɔɔ ka nɩrɛ jaa tu wʊ ɛ, ka Pita nɩ Jemesɩ nɩ a wʊ yɛbile Jɔɔn tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ. 38Ban wa ta a Jairusɩ yir, Yesu nyɛ naa a nɩbɛ na kõnõ ŋmiere chɛlsɩ. 39Ka wʊ kpɛ tɩ sʊʊr ba, “Bãa lɛ yɩ kõnõ ŋmiere nɩ a chɛlsɩ a lɛ? A bie ba kpi ɛ. Wʊ gur naa.” 40A ba laara tʊrɔ nɩ wʊ. Wʊ dii naa a nɩbɛ ba jaa bar ka ba yi tɩ wʊ tara a bie sãa nɩ a ma nɩ a wʊ poturbo bala wʊn 'mataa chiin, a ba kpɛ a jie 'lɔ a bikũu na be. 41Ka wʊ tɩ nyɔɔ a pɔɔbile nũu tɩ 'yɛr, “Talita kum!” A par lɛ a Yesu nɩbɛ kɔkɔr pɔ, “Pɔɔbile, ir!” 42Ka wʊ vaa ir chiine. Yuomo pie nɩ ayi bie lɛ. Ka a yele 'maa ba nɛɛ. 43Yesu kpaal ba naa jũu ka ba taa vɛ̃ ka a nɩrɛ jaa wõ naa ɛ. Tɩ 'yɛr ɩka ba kʊ a pɔɔbile bʊ̃diir ka wʊ di.

Title: MAAKƖ 6
Content:
1Yesu yi naa a be ka a wʊ poturbo tu wʊ ka a ba 'mataa kul a Najaretɩ na ɩ a wʊ tẽe. 2Ka a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir wa ta, ka wʊ kpɛ be a ba lɔ̃ɔfʊ jie tɩ piel wile, ka a nɩyɔɔ bala na wõ nɛɛr 'maa. Ka ba sʊrɔ, “Nyɩnɛ lɛ a daba nyã nyɛ a bɔ̃ɔfʊ nyã? Yɛ̃ buor lɛ a nyã wʊn tara na wʊ gba tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃? 3A ba ɩ a mɩmɩɛrɛ lɛ ɛ? A ba ɩ a Mɛɛr bie lɛ ɛ, a wʊ yɛbil ɩ Jemesɩ nɩ Josesɩ nɩ Judas nɩ Simon ɛ? Ka a wʊ yɛpɔbɔ mɩ be ka a sɩ sɛ̃ ɛ?”
4Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ nyɛrɛ na 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ jie jaa, tɩchɛ a wʊ mãɛ tẽe nɩ a wʊ yir dẽme nɩ a wʊ nɩbɛ sɛ̃ lɛ waa nyɛrɛ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ ɛ.” 5Waa tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃ nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ yɔɔ a be ɛ, tɩ wʊ dɔɔl a wʊ nũu baalsɩ bãlãa a ba sa. 6Yesu nɛɛ 'maa wʊ naa bojũu baa sɔɔ de wʊ ɛ. Wʊ yɔn gʊɔr a tẽn na wʊ wile. 7Wʊ bʊɔl naa a wʊ poturbo Pie nɩ Ayi bala wʊn dɔ̃ɔ ir, ka ba wa a wʊ sɛ̃ ka wʊ tʊ̃ ba ayir yir, na wʊ kʊ ba kpɛ̃ɔ ka ba tʊ̃ɔ sɩdɛbɛ.
8Wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ ta de bon jaa ɛ, yɩ tara dadiirsɩ tɛɛ. Yɩ ta tara bʊ̃diir ɛ, bɩɩ wʊʊr ɛ, bɩɩ yɔ̃ɔ libie a yɩ sɩɩr gãma pɔ ɛ. 9Yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ su nafɔbɔ nɩ fuu bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ. 10Yir jaa pɔ yɩn wa kpɛ, yɩ be a be tɩ ta a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ yɩn wa yi a tẽe 'lɔ pɔ. 11Tẽe jaa pɔ yɩn wa kpɛ ka baa de yɩ ɛ, bɩɩ sɔɔ a 'yɛr ɛ, yɩn wa yire yɩ kpoor a yɩ gbɛɛ tã-uul ka a di a ba dɛɛr dãasɩɛ.”
12Ba yin chen tɩ mʊɔlɔ 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ɩka a nɩbɛ ba lɩɛb ba tɩɛr. 13Ba diin a sɩdɛbɛ ka a yi, tɩ 'lɩɩ baalsɩ kãa ka ba sa.
14A nãa Hɛrɔd mɩ wõ naa a anyã, bojũu nɩrɛ jaa wõ naa a Yesu yuor. Ka a bamɩne 'yɛrɛ, “A Jɔɔn 'lɔ na ɩ a kɔ̃suoro, 'lɔ lɛ tɔ̃ɔ yi a yaa pɔ, ala lɛ so ka wʊ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ a lɛ.”
15Ka a banyã mɩ 'yɛrɛ, “Elaija lɛ.” Ka a bamɩne mɩ chɛnɛ 'yɛrɛ, “Wʊ ɩ naa a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ ãsʊɔ nɩtãa a bala na dɔ̃ɔ be be a kõro jaa.”
16Tɩchɛ a Hɛrɔd na wa wõ, wʊ 'yɛr naa, “A Jɔɔn 'lɔ ɩn vɛ̃ ka ba ŋmaa a wʊ ju lɛ, yi.”
17A Hɛrɔd mãɛ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ vɛ̃ ka ba nyɔɔ a Jɔɔn waan, wa lũ 'yɔ̃ɔ a pɔɔfʊ die pɔ. Wʊ ɩ naa a nɩtɔ̃, a wʊ yɛbile Filip pɔɔ Hɛrɔdiyas wʊn de jũu. 18Jɔɔn 'yɛr kʊ a Hɛrɔd, “A ba tara sɔr ɩka fʊ de a fʊ yɛbil vʊr pɔɔ kul ɛ.” 19Ka a Hɛrɔdiyas tara nɩ a Jɔɔn jɛɛr bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ kʊ wʊ, tɩchɛ waa tʊ̃ɔ ɛ. 20A Hɛrɔd bɔ̃ɔ naa a Jɔɔn na ɩ nɩsʊ̃ nɩ chɛchɛ, na wʊ joro a Jɔɔn dãbãɛ, na wʊ gu wʊ tara. A Hɛrɔd wa wõ a Jɔɔn 'yɛr a ma sɔb wʊn nɩbir, tɩchɛ wʊ ma bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka wʊ chɛlɛ a wʊ 'yɛr.
21Tɩchɛ sɔr wa yuon kʊ a Hɛrɔdiyas a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a nãa na wa maala a wʊ dɔɔfʊ bɩbir yele. A wʊ dɔɔfʊ bɩbir nyãna daar, wʊ bʊɔl naa a nɩbɛrɛ bala na turo a wʊ puor, nɩ a sojasɩ nɩbɛrɛ, nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ na be a Galilee pɔ. 22A Hɛrɔdiyas bipɔɔ wa kpɛ naa, na wʊ sɛ a bãnɛ ka a pɛl a nãa Hɛrɔd nɩ a wʊ nɩbɛrɛ bala ba jaa pʊɔ. Ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a pɔɔbile, “Sʊɔr ma bon jaa fʊn bʊɔrɔ, ɩn kʊ fʊ naa.” 23Be lɛ wʊ põl kʊ a pɔɔbile, “Bon jaa fʊn sʊɔr ala ɩ a n nãalʊ̃ʊ ŋmaa gba lɛ, n na kʊ fʊ naa.”
24Ka wʊ yi chen tɩ sʊʊr a wʊ ma, “Bo lɛ ɩn sʊɔr?” Ka a wʊ ma 'yɛr wʊ, “Tɩ sʊɔr a Jɔɔn Kɔ̃suor ju.”
25Ka a pɔɔbile yi pɔɔ fɔɔ lɛ kpɛ a nãa sɛ̃ tɩ 'yɛr, “N bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a Jɔɔn Kɔ̃suor ju a la'yɛlma pɔ kʊ ma a pʊ̃pãanyã.”
26A nãa pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ naa, tɩchɛ a nɩbɛ bala wʊn bʊɔl na wʊn põl kʊ a pɔɔbile jũu, waa bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ tɔr ɛ. 27Ka wʊ tʊ̃ a nɩkʊrɔ ãsʊɔ a dẽdẽe daa ɩka wʊ chen tɩ ŋmaa a Jɔɔn ju waan. A daba chen tɩ ŋmaa a Jɔɔn ju a pɔɔfʊ die pɔ 28'yɔ̃ɔ a la'yɛlma pɔ waan, wa kʊ a pɔɔbile ka wʊ de kʊ a wʊ ma. 29A Jɔɔn poturbo na wõ a lɛ, ba chen tɩ 'mɔɔ wʊ na ba ũu.
30A Yesu nɩtʊ̃nsɩ lɩɛb wa lɔ̃ɔ taa a wʊ sɛ̃, na ba wa man a lɛ jaa ban tʊ̃ tɩ wiil a nɩbɛ, na ba kʊ a Yesu. 31A nɩbɛ yɔɔ na waara tɩ chiine jũu, jaa gba ba be be a ban di ɛ. Be lɛ ka Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ wa a sɩn tɛɛ chen a jie 'lɔ a nɩbɛ na ba be ɛ, a yɩ tɩ jãnɛ pɛ̃n.”
32Ba kpɛ naa a gboro bala tɛɛ chen a jie 'lɔ̃nɔ̃. 33Tɩchɛ a nɩbɛ na wa nyɛ ban chiine ba bɔ̃ɔ ba naa. A ba yi a tẽn a jaa de nie jon gbɛɛ tɩ ara a be. 34A Yesu na wa tɩ ta, na wʊ nyɛ a nɩyɔɔ a ba ɩrɛ nɩbaal a wʊ sɛ̃, ban kaara fɩka piir na ba tara chɩnɛ jũu, wʊ piel wile ba yelyɔɔ.
35Mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ na wa mʊrɔ a wʊ poturbo wa naa wa 'yɛr kʊ a Yesu, “A ka ɩ naa mɔgɔ̃ɔ, tɩ a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ mɩ mʊrɔ; 36wɛl a nɩbɛ bar a ba chen a por nɩ a tẽn na gbʊr tɩ bɔ bʊ̃diir da di.”
37Ka be lɛ a Yesu 'yɛr sɔɔ ba, “Yɩn mãɛ yɩ kʊ ba bʊ̃kɔ̃ɔ a ba di.” Ka a poturbo 'yɛr ɩka, “Nyɩnɛ lɛ sɩn nyɛ a libie anyãna? Nɩbʊ̃'yen ŋmɛrsɩ aniin sãyar gba! Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ sɩn ɩ kʊ ba jaa bʊ̃diir?”
38A be lɛ a Yesu sʊʊr ba, “Paanʊ̃ɔsɩ aŋmɩnɛ lɛ yɩ tara? Yɩ chen tɩ kaa.” Be lɛ ba chen tɩ kaa tɩ wa 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Paanʊ̃ɔsɩ anũu, nɩ jãmɛ ayi.”
39A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a poturbo a ba ɩ a nɩbɛ ba jaa a ba jɛ̃ gbulsɩ a mɔ'yɔlɔ ju. 40Be lɛ a nɩbɛ jãnɛ jãnɛ, a gbulsɩ gbulsɩ. Bamɩne jãnɛ naa kɔɔr kɔɔr, ka bamɩne mɩ jãnɛ lɩjaayi nɩ piir. 41A Yesu de naa a paanʊ̃ɔsɩ anũu nɩ a jãmɛ ayi ala na wʊ kaa saaju tɩ dʊl puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan. Wʊ de naa a paanʊ̃ɔsɩ ŋma ŋma tɩ de kʊ a wʊ poturbo tɩ 'yɛr, “Yɩ de põ a nɩbɛ.” Tɩ lɛ de a jãmɛ ayi ala mɩ ŋma põ a nɩbɛ. 42A nɩbɛ ba jaa din, na ba tɩɩ, 43tɩchɛ ka a poturbo wob a bʊ̃ŋmaara 'yɔ̃ɔ pɛr pie nɩ ayi. 44A nɩbɛ bala na dɔ̃ɔ di a bʊ̃diir ala, dɔɔr tɛɛ ɩ naa tur anũu.
45Ajienaa, ka a Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ poturbo a ba kpɛ a gboro na ba de nie chiine a Betɩsaida tɩ wʊ na wɛl a nɩbɛ bar. 46Wʊn wa bar ba wa baar, wʊ do naa a tɔ̃ɔ ju ɩka wʊ tɩ puor.
47A wɛr na wa sɔɔrɔ, a gboro be naa a man sãlsɔɔ, tɩchɛ ka wʊ be a wɛyõo, 'lɔ tɛɛ. 48Wʊ nyɛ naa a wʊ poturbo ka ba mɔ̃nɔ̃ a gboro faara bojũu a sɛsɛbɛ furo na tuoro ba. A wɛr na wa gbʊrɔ a chaarfʊ, wʊ yin chiine a kʊ̃ɔ ju waara a ba sɛ̃, ta bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ po ba. 49Ban wa nyɛ wʊn chiine a kʊ̃ɔ ju a lɛ, ba tɩɛr ɩka kpĩin lɛ, na ba ŋme chɛlsɩ, 50bojũu ba jaa nyɛ wʊ naa ka dãbãɛ kpɛ ba. Ajienaa, ka a Yesu tãn, “Yɩ nyɔɔ nyãa! Maa lɛ! Yɩ taa joro dãbãɛ ɛ.” 51Tɩ pãa kpɛ a gboro pɔ ka a sɛsɛbɛ ŋmaa vʊʊr. Ka a nɛɛr 'maa ba yɔɔ jaa. 52Baa dɔ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a paanʊ̃ɔsɩ ala par ɛ, bojũu a ba ju ba wõnõ nyaar ɛ.
53Ban wa gɔ̃ɔ a man do lũ a gboro a Genesaretɩ gɔ̃ɔn, 54tɩ tɔ̃ɔ yi a gboro pɔ, nɩbɛ nyɛ naa a Yesu bɔ̃ɔ. 55A nɩbɛ jon yɔ a wɛr 'lɔ wʊ jaa na ba tuo a ba baalsɩ nɩ sɔ̃n chiin jie jaa ban wõ ɩka wʊ be naa. 56Jie jaa wʊn chen, tẽkpɛ̃ɛ pɔ bɩɩ, tẽbile pɔ bɩɩ, ka a tẽe kõkoor lɛ̃ɛɛ, ba ma gaal naa a ba baalsɩ a chãa pɔ. Ba ma sʊɔrɔ naa a Yesu ɩka wʊ sɔɔ ka ba sɩɩr a wʊ fuu nɛɛ gba, bala jaa na sɩɩr, ma sa naa.

Title: MAAKƖ 7
Content:
1A Faraseemɩne nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe bamɩne yi naa a Jerusalɛm wa lɔ̃ɔ a Yesu sɛ̃, 2na ba nyɛ a wʊ poturbo ka ba dire nɩ nũdɛbɛ. Ka a lɛ wiil ɩka baa pɛɛ a ba nuur a, “Puorfʊ pɛɛfʊ 'lɔ ɛ.” 3A Faraseemɩne nɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ba maa di ka bala ba pɛɛ a ba puorfʊ pɛɛfʊ 'lɔ ɛ, na ba turo a lɛ a ba nɩbɛrɛ na bin. 4Bala wa yi daa wa, ba maa di ka bala ba pɛɛ a pɛɛfʊ 'lɔ ɛ. Ban turo a ba bin yɔɔ ala jũu, ba ma pɛɛn a ŋmama, dʊʊr nɩ a kulaar. 5Ala lɛ so ka a Faraseemɩne nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe sʊʊr a Yesu, “Bo lɛ so ka a fʊ poturbo ba turo a lɛ a sɩ nɩbɛrɛ na bin ɛ, na baa pɛɛ a ba nuur ɛ tɩ dire nɩ nũdɛbɛ!”
6Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ a Isaiya dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a yɩn nɛɛr ayi dẽme 'yɛr na wʊ sɛb. Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr naa, ‘A yɩn nɩbɛ banyãna 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ma naa nɩ a yɩ nɛɛ, tɩchɛ ka a yɩ pʊtɩɛr jãa a n sɛ̃. 7Pɔrɔ lɛ yɩ puoro ma, bojũu yɩ wile naa nɩsaal nɛbinsɩ tɩ tɩɛr ɩka maa nɛɛ lɛ.’ (Isaiya 29:13) 8Yɩ bar naa a Nãaŋmɩn Nɛɛ tɩ turo a lɛ a yɩ nɩbɛrɛ na bin.
9“A ba ɩ ka yɩ de yɛ̃ bar a Nãaŋmɩn Nɛɛ tufʊ tɩ turo a lɛ a yɩn mãɛ na bin ɛ. 10Mosesɩ 'yɛr naa a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, ‘'Yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a fʊ sãa nɩ a fʊ ma.’ (A Yifʊ Gãn 20:12) Na wʊ mɩ lɛ 'yɛr, ‘Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa wa pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ sãa bɩɩ a wʊ ma, ba kʊ wʊ.’ (A Yifʊ Gãn 21:17) 11Tɩchɛ ka yɩn 'yɛr ɩka a sɛɛ na, nɩrɛ wa 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ sãa bɩɩ a wʊ ma, ‘Bon jaa ɩn naa kʊ fʊ, n den kʊ Nãaŋmɩn.’ 12Yɩ maa lɛ vɛ̃ ka wʊ maal bon jaa kʊ a wʊ sãa bɩɩ a wʊ ma ɛ. 13Yɩn ɩrɛ a nɩtɔ̃ jũu, ka yɩ kaara a Nãaŋmɩn Nɛɛ pɔrɔ tɩ turo a lɛ yɩn mãɛ na bin. Yelyɔɔ mɩ ben be yɩn ɩrɛ nɩ nyɛtaa a nɩtɔ̃.”
14A Yesu lɛ bɔ̃ɔ bʊɔl a nɩyɔɔ ka ba lɩɛb wa a wʊ sɛ̃. Ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ chɛl wõ ɩn 'yɛrɛ tɩ na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a par. 15Bon jaa ba be ka a yõo ka nɩrɛ na de di ka a bʊ̃nyɩnɛ vɛ̃ ka wʊ dɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ bon 'lɔ na yi a nɩrɛ pʊtɩɛr pɔ lɛ na vɛ̃ ka wʊ dɛɛ.”
17Sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ wʊn wa bar a nɩyɔɔ bala tɩ kpɛ a yir, a wʊ poturbo sʊʊr wʊ naa a sʊkpa par. 18Ka a Yesu sʊʊr ba, “Yɩ mɩ ɩ naa a nɩbɛ bala na ba bɔ̃ɔ a par bɩɩ? Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka bon jaa ba be be ka nɩrɛ na de di na wʊ dɛɛ ɛ, 19bojũu wʊ maa kpɛ a wʊ tɩɛr pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ pʊɔm lɛ wʊ ma suu na wʊ tɩ yi.” Yesu 'yɛr a nɩtɔ̃ na wʊ wiil ɩka a bʊ̃diir a jaa sɛɛn difʊ.
20Na wʊ mɩ lɛ 'yɛr ɩka, “Bon nyã na yi a nɩrɛ pʊtɩɛr pɔ lɛ ma tʊ̃ɔ vɛ̃ ka wʊ dɛɛ. 21Ala na ma yi a nɩrɛ pʊtɩɛr pɔ lɛ, tɩɛr dɛbɛ, nɩ a sɛ̃sɛ̃yele, nɩ a nãnyuur, nɩ nɩrɛ kʊfʊ, nɩ sɛ̃fʊ, 22nɩ a nyuur, nɩ a putuo, nɩ jire, nɩ kakaba, nɩ bɔbier, nɩ yosɔ̃ɔ, nɩ pɔlyele nɩ a jɔlyele. 23A yeldɛbɛ anyãna a jaa lɛ ma yi a nɩrɛ pʊtɩɛr pɔ, vɛ̃ ka wʊ dɛɛ.”
24Be lɛ ka a Yesu yi a be na wʊ chen a Tire wɛr pɔ. Wʊ tɩ kpɛ naa a yir ãsʊɔ pɔ, tɩ waa bʊɔrɔ ɩka nɩrɛ jaa wʊ bɔ̃ɔ ka wʊ ben be ɛ. Tɩchɛ wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ sɔɔl ɛ. 25Ala a pɔɔ na tara wʊ bipɔɔ ka a sɩdɛɛr tara, ajienaa wʊn wʊ wõ a Yesu 'yɛr, wʊ wan wa lo gbur dumo a wʊ niem. 26A pɔɔ ba dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a Juu nɩrɛ ɛ, na wʊ dɔ̃ɔ yi be a Siriya Fonisiya paal pɔ. Wʊ sʊɔr naa a Yesu ɩka, wʊ dii a sɩdɛɛr bar a wʊ bipɔɔ pɔ.
27Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Bar ka a bibiir di a lɛ ban bʊɔrɔ, taa de a bibiir bʊ̃diir kʊ baar ɛ.”
28Ka a pɔɔ mɩ 'yɛr, “Sɩrɛ lɛ, n Soro, tɩchɛ a baar mɩ ma dire naa a bʊ̃ pʊr pʊr ala a bibiir na ma dire, tɩchɛ ka a loro a tẽe.”
29Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “A nɩtɔ̃ fʊn 'yɛr jũu, kulo. A sɩdɛɛr bar naa a fʊ bipɔɔ.”
30Wʊ kul tɩ nyɛ a bie na gã a gado ju, tɩ a sɩdɛɛr yi.
31Yesu lɛ yi naa a Tire wɛr pɔ, na wʊ tu a Sidon suu a Galilee man pɔ, na wʊ tɩ chen a Dekapolisɩ paal pɔ. 32Be lɛ ka nɩbɛ bamɩne waan daba na ɩ wõo, na waa tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ 'yɛrɛ sʊ̃ ɛ. Ba sʊɔr a Yesu ka wʊ sɩɩr a daba nɩ a wʊ nũu na wʊ sãa wʊ.
33Ka Yesu tara a daba yin chɛ̃chɛ̃ɛ, na wʊ de a wʊ nubie su a daba tobɔɔr pɔ, be lɛ wʊ chɩr nataar tɩ sɩɩr a daba jãlbir. 34Na wʊ dʊl kaa a saaju tɩ vʊʊr na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a daba, “Efata!”, a par lɛ a Yesu nɩbɛ kɔkɔr pɔ, yuo. 35Ajienaa ka a daba tobo yuo ka a jãlbir lɩɛb ka wʊ piel 'yɛrɛ jaa chɛchɛ.
36Yesu kpaal ban jũu ɩka ba taa ɩrɛ wa 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ nɩrɛ jaa ɛ. Tɩchɛ a lɛ wʊn kpãa ba lɛ lɛ ba mɩ 'yɛrɛ yʊɔrɔ nɩ a jie wʊ jaa. 37A nɩbɛ nɛɛ 'maan yɔɔ jaa ka ba 'yɛrɛ, “Wʊ ɩn yele jaa sʊ̃. Wʊ gba ma vɛ̃ naa ka wõo wõnõ, tɩ jãlbir lɩɛb 'yɛrɛ chɛchɛ.”

Title: MAAKƖ 8
Content:
1A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ pɔ, nɩyɔɔ lɛ lɔ̃ɔn taa go a Yesu sɛ̃, tɩ baa tara bon na di ɛ. Yesu bʊɔl a wʊ poturbo ka ba wa a wʊ sɛ̃ ka wʊ 'yɛr, 2“A nɩbɛ banyã ɩrɛ naa nɩbaal, bojũu ber ata nɩ nyã ban be a n sɛ̃, baa lɛ tara bon na di ɛ. 3Maa mɩ bar ba ka ba kulo nɩ a kɔ̃, ban tɩ lon sɔr pɔ, bojũu bamɩne yin tɛɛr.”
4Ka a wʊ poturbo 'yɛr, “Tɩchɛ nyɩnɛ lɛ a kanaa a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ nɩrɛ na nyɛ bʊ̃diir kʊ ba?”
5Ka a Yesu sʊʊr ba, “Paanʊ̃ɔsɩ aŋmɩnɛ lɛ yɩ tara?” Ka ba 'yɛr, “Paanʊ̃ɔsɩ ayopõi.”
6Wʊ 'yɛr naa a nɩbɛ, ka ba jãnɛ tẽe, tɩ na wʊ de a paanʊ̃ɔsɩ ayopõi ala puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan, tɩ ŋma ŋma de kʊ a wʊ poturbo ka ba de põ a nɩbɛ. 7Ba tara naa a jãbil amɩne, ka wʊ de a ala mɩ puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan, tɩ 'yɛr ɩka a poturbo ba de põ a nɩbɛ. 8Ba di naa tɩɩ tɩ chɛ. Ka a wʊ poturbo wob a bʊ̃ŋmaara ala ban di faa 'yɔ̃ɔ pɛr ayopõi. 9Ba ɩ naa tur anaar. Ka wʊ bar ba a sɔr. 10Ajienaa, 'lɔ nɩ a wʊ poturbo 'mantaa kpɛ a gboro pɔ, na ba chen a Dalmanuta paal pɔ.
11Be lɛ a Faraseemɩne wa sʊrɔ wʊ yelsʊʊrsɩ, bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba bɛɛr wʊ kaa, na ba 'yɛr ɩka wʊ wiil ba jãnɛ kɔ̃ɔ ka ba bɔ̃ɔ ɩka wʊ yin a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃. 12Ka wʊ vʊʊr lɛ fãa tɩ 'yɛr, “Bo lɛ so ka a yɩn pʊ̃pãanyã nɩbɛ bʊɔrɔ jãnɛ ɩka yɩ nyɛ? Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, yɩ kʊ̃ nyɛ jãnɛ jaa ɛ.” 13Wʊ bar ba naa tɩ kpɛ a gboro gɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a man gɔ̃ɔn.
14A wʊ poturbo ĩin naa ba tara paanʊ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩ tara bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ a gboro pɔ. 15Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a Faraseemɩne paanʊ̃ɔ dãbɩl nɩ a Hɛrɔd paanʊ̃ɔ dãbɩl mɩ.”
16Ka a wʊ poturbo guor taa 'yɛrɛ, “Sɩn ba tara a paanʊ̃ɔ lɛ so.”
17Yesu na bɔ̃ɔn a lɛ ban 'yɛrɛ, wʊ sʊʊr ba naa, “Bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ yɩ 'yɛrɛ ɩka yaa tara paanʊ̃ɔ ɛ? Yaa bɔ̃ɔ a par sɛrɛ ɛ? A yɩ nyãa kpɛ̃mɛ na mɩ? 18Yɩ tara na nɩbie tɩ ba nyɛrɛ ɛ, na yɩ tara tobo tɩ ba wõnõ ɛ. Yɩ ĩin bɩɩ? 19A paanʊ̃ɔsɩ anũu ɩn dɔ̃ɔ de ŋma kʊ a dɔɔr tur anũu, pɛr aŋmɩnɛ lɛ yɩ wob a bʊ̃ŋmaar na chɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ?” Ka ba 'yɛr, “Pɛr pie nɩ ayi.” 20Ka a Yesu lɛ bɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr, “Ɩn lɛ de a paanʊ̃ɔsɩ ayopõi na n ŋma kʊ a nɩbɛ tur anaar, pɛr aŋmɩnɛ lɛ yɩ lɛ wob 'yɔ̃ɔ?” Ka ba 'yɛr, “Pɛr ayopõi.” 21Ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yaa bɔ̃ɔ a par sɛrɛ ɛ?”
22Ba wa ta na a Betɩsaida tẽe pɔ, ka a nɩbɛ bamɩne tara jɔ̃ɔ waan a Yesu sɛ̃ wa sʊɔr wʊ, ka wʊ sɩɩr a jɔ̃ɔ ka wʊ nyɛrɛ. 23Yesu nyɔɔ naa a jɔ̃ɔ nũu tɩ tɔɔ wʊ yin a tẽe chɛchɛ. Wʊ tɩ chɩr nataar 'yɔ̃ɔ a daba nɩbie pɔ tɩ dɔɔl wʊ a nũu tɩ sʊʊr wʊ, “Fʊ nyɛn bon bɩɩ?”
24Ka a daba dʊɔ kaa tɩ 'yɛr, “N nyɛn nɩbɛ na kaara tɩɩr kaar na ba vire yʊɔrɔ.”
25Ka a Yesu lɛ de a wʊ nuur pɔɔ a daba nɩbie, ka a wʊ nɩbie yuo, ka wʊ nyɛrɛ pãa nyɛ bomo a jaa chɛchɛ. 26Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Kulo, ta lɛ kpɛ a tẽe pɔ ɛ.”
27Yesu nɩ a wʊ poturbo chen naa a tẽn ala naa gbʊr Sisariya Filipai. A sɔr pɔ ban be chiine, a Yesu sʊʊr ba naa, “An lɛ a nɩbɛ 'yɛrɛ ɩka n ɩ naa?”
28Ka ba 'yɛr, “Bamɩne 'yɛr naa ɩka fʊ̃ʊ lɛ a Jɔɔn 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ suoro a nɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ. Ka bamɩne mɩ 'yɛr ɩka Elaija. Ka a bamɩne mɩ chɛnɛ 'yɛrɛ ɩka fʊ ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ ãsʊɔ na dɔ̃ɔ be be.”
29Ka a Yesu sʊʊr ba, “Tɩchɛ an lɛ yɩ mɩ 'yɛr ɩka n ɩ naa?” Ka a Pita 'yɛr, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ a Nɩ-iraa, a Nãaŋmɩn na tʊ̃ ɩka fʊ faa a wʊ nɩbɛ.”
30Ka a Yesu kpãa ba, “Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa 'yɛrɛ a n 'yɛr kʊrɔ nɩrɛ jaa ɛ.”
31Yesu piel wile ba na wʊ 'yɛrɛ ɩka a Nɩsaal Bie na din dɔɔyɛ yele yɔɔ pɔ, ka a Juu nɩbɛrɛ, nɩ a ba bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe tɔr wʊ bar, na ba kʊ wʊ. Tɩchɛ a ber ata daar wʊn ir naa a kũu pɔ ɩ vʊr. 32Wʊ 'yɛr naa anyã chãa pɔ, ka a Pita tara wʊ yin chɛ̃chɛ̃ɛ tɩ piel mii 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ.
33Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu lɩɛb kaa a wʊ poturbo tɩ mɩ mii 'yɔ̃ɔ a Pita 'yɛrɛ, “Tɔɔ chen be, Satan! A fʊ tɩɛr ɩn nɩrɛ tɩɛr, waa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn tɩɛr ɛ.”
34Be lɛ wʊ bʊɔl a nɩyɔɔ nɩ a poturbo ka ba wa a wʊ sɛ̃, ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ turo ma, a nɩnyɩnɛ na 'laara a wʊ mãɛ tɩ de a daa na ɩ dɔɔyɛ nɩ kũu, tɩ turo ma. 35Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na bʊɔrɔ a wʊ nyɛvʊr, a wʊ nyɛvʊr na bɔr na, tɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sɔɔ a wʊ nyɛvʊr bɔrfʊ a maa nɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã jũu, na faa wʊ naa. 36Ala ɩ nɩrɛ tara naa a wɛr nyã bonsɩ a jaa tɩ a wʊ sɩɛ wɛ, bo tɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ be be? 37Bɩɩ bo lɛ nɩrɛ na de tɛɛn a wʊ sɩɛ? 38Ala ɩ nɩrɛ mɩ nyɛ naa a maa nɩ a n 'yɛrbie ka a ɩ vã yele a nɩbɛ banyã na tɔr Nãaŋmɩn bar, nɩ a putudẽme sɛ̃, a Nɩsaal Bie mɩ na kaa naa a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ ka wʊ ɩ vĩ sʊɔ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ wʊn wa lɩɛb wa nɩ a wʊ Sãa tɩɩr 'matãan a malaka chɛchɛsɩ.”

Title: MAAKƖ 9
Content:
1Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, bamɩne ara naa a kana na ba kʊ̃ kpi ɛ, tɩchɛ na ba nyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ na na wa nɩ kpɛ̃ɔ.”
2A ber ayʊɔb puor, Yesu tara naa Pita nɩ Jemesɩ nɩ Jɔɔn tɛɛ na wʊ de ba nie ka ba 'mataa do tɔ̃wõo kɔ̃ɔ ju. Be lɛ wʊ tɩ chil a ba niem. 3A wʊ fuu pɛl nyɩlɛ gar bʊ̃pɩla jaa nɩrɛ na maal a ka a wɛr pɔ. 4Ka a Elaija nɩ a Mosesɩ, wa daa yi a ba sɛ̃. Ka bala nɩ a Yesu 'mataa 'yɛrɛ.
5Ka a Pita 'yɛr kʊ a Yesu, “Wiwile, a sɛɛ naa sɩn be a ka. Sɔɔ, ka sɩ maal sɛɛr ata: fʊ̃ʊ ãsʊɔ, Mosesɩ ãsʊɔ, Elaija mɩ ãsʊɔ.” 6Pita ba bɔ̃ɔ ŋmɩnɛ wʊ na 'yɛr ɛ, bojũu dãbãɛ kpɛ ba naa.
7Ka a julõjuur wa pɔɔ ba, tɩ kɔkɔr 'yɛr a be a julõjuur pɔ, “N binʊ̃nãa lɛ a nyãna. Yɩ chɛlɛ a wʊ 'yɛr.”
8Ajienaa ban ɩka ba kaa, baa lɛ nyɛ nɩrɛ jaa ɛ, tɩ nyɛ a Yesu tɛɛ.
9Ban wa yi a tɔ̃ɔ ju suro, ka a Yesu kpãa ba ɩka ba taa wa 'yɛrɛ a lɛ ban nyɛ kʊrɔ nɩrɛ jaa ɛ, wa tɩ tãn a lɛ a Nɩsaal Bie na ir yi a wʊ kũu pɔ. 10Baa 'yɛr kʊ nɩrɛ jaa ɛ, tɩ 'yɛrɛ na ba sʊrɔ taa a kũu pɔ irfʊ par.
11Ka ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Bo lɛ so ka a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe 'yɛr ɩka Elaija lɛ na de nie wa?”
12Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ a Elaija de nie wa chɔɔr a yele jaa. Tɩ ba mɩ sɛb ɩka a Nɩsaal Bie na din dɔɔyɛ yɔɔ ka ba tɔr wʊ bar. 13Tɩchɛ n 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka a Elaija wa naa ka ba ɩ a lɛ jaa ban bʊɔrɔ kʊ wʊ nɩtãa a lɛ ban sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ.”
14Ban wa ta a poturbo ŋmaa bala sɛ̃, ba nyɛn nɩyɔɔ na ara jilʊ̃ ba ka a bala nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe chɩrɛ taa. 15Ka nɩbɛ na wa nyɛ a Yesu na waara, ka ba nɛɛ 'maa ka ba jo tuor puor wʊ.
16Ka a Yesu sʊʊr a wʊ poturbo, “Bo lɛ yɩ chɩrɛ taa a lɛ?”
17Ka nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ 'yɛr a be a nɩyɔɔ pɔ, “Wiwile, n bidaba lɛ sɩdɛɛr nyɔɔ ka wʊ maa tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr ɛ, ka n waan a fʊ sɛ̃. 18'Lɔ wa ir wʊ, wʊ ma daa wʊn lɔb tẽe ka wʊ furo a natafuul tɩ ɔɔrɔ a nyɩmɛ tɩ tãa. Ka n wa sʊɔr a fʊ poturbo ɩka ba dii a sɩdɛɛr nyãna bar, ka baa tʊ̃ɔ ɛ.”
19Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Aa, a yɩn nɩbɛ banyã na ba tara sɔɔfʊ ɛ, n be a yɩ sɛ̃ kor ta ŋmɩnɛ? N tara kãnyir ŋmɩnɛ kʊ yɩ? Waan a bie wa kʊ ma.”
20Ka ba waan a bie. A sɩɛ na wa nyɛ a Yesu, wʊ ir tãa a bie ka wʊ lo tẽe, mɩrɛ tɩ bile tɩ furo a natafuul.
21Be lɛ a Yesu sʊʊr a bie sãa, “Sɔ̃ɔ buor lɛ a piel wʊ a nɩtɔ̃?” Ka a sãa 'yɛr, “A bibile daar jaa lɛ a piel wʊ. 22Wʊ ma daa wʊn lɔb bũu pɔ bɩɩ kʊ̃ɔ pɔ bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ kpi. Ala ɩ fʊn tʊ̃ɔ ɩ yele kɔ̃ɔ, kaa a sɩ nɩbaal tɩ na fʊ sʊ̃ʊ sɩ.”
23Ka a Yesu mɩ 'yɛr, “Bo lɛ so ka a fʊ 'yɛr ɩka ala ɩ ɩn tʊ̃ɔ naa? Yele jaa ɩn kɔ̃mɔ̃kɔ̃mɔ̃ kʊ a bala na sɔɔ de ma.”
24Ajienaa lɛ a bie sãa chɩɩr, “N sɔɔn de fʊ! Sʊ̃ʊ ma, a n sɔɔfʊ ba bɛrma ɛ!”
25Yesu na wa nyɛ a nɩyɔɔ na joro lɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa a jie, wʊ tãn a sɩdɛɛr, “Fʊ̃ʊ sɩdɛɛr na ma vɛ̃ ka nɩbɛ ɩ wõn, wa yi a bie pɔ na fʊ taa lɛ ɩrɛ wa kpɩɛrɛ a wʊ pɔ go ɛ!”
26Ka a sɩɛ ŋme chɛlma tɩ dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a bie yɔɔ tɩ yi, ka a bie gã kaara fɩka kũu. Ka a nɩbɛ 'yɛr, “Wʊ kpi naa!” 27Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu nyɔɔ a wʊ nũu tɔɔ, ka wʊ ir ara.
28Yesu na wa kpɛ a yir 'lɔ nɩ a wʊ poturbo tɛɛ, ka ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Bãa lɛ so ka sɩn ba tʊ̃ɔ a sɩdɛɛr nyã dii bar ɛ?”
29Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ tɛɛ lɛ na vɛ̃ a fʊ dii a sɩɛ nyã ka wʊ yi.”
30Ba yin a jie 'lɔ tɩ tu a Galilee tal. Yesu ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka nɩrɛ jaa wʊ bɔ̃ɔ a jie ban be ɛ, 31bojũu wʊ wile naa a wʊ poturbo, “Ban de naa a Nɩsaal Bie kʊ a nɩbɛ, ka ba kʊ wʊ. Ka a ber ata daar wʊn ir naa, na wʊ tara nyɛvʊr.” 32Tɩchɛ baa bɔ̃ɔ a par a lɛ wʊn 'yɛrɛ ɛ, tɩ joro dãbãɛ ɩka ba sʊʊr wʊ.
33Yesu nɩ a wʊ poturbo wa ta na a Kapenahum. Ban wa kpɛ a yir, a Yesu sʊʊr ba naa, “Bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ yɩ chɩrɛ taa a sɔr pɔ a lɛ?” 34Ka ba ɩ jaa gbulo, bojũu a sɔr pɔ ba chɩrɛ na taa ɩka an lɛ ɩ a kpɛ̃ɛ.
35Yesu na wa jãnɛ wʊ bʊɔl naa a wʊ poturbo Pie nɩ Ayi na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A yɩ ãsʊɔ wa bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ de nie, a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ wʊ ɩ a yɩ jaa bile, na wʊ ɩ a yɩ jaa tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃.”
36Yesu vɛ̃ naa ka bibile kɔ̃ɔ ir ara a ba jaa sãlsɔɔ. Wʊ 'mɔɔn a bie tɩ 'yɛr kʊ ba, 37“Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na de a bibiir banyãna taaba a n jũu, maa lɛ wʊ de. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa mɩ na de ma, a ba ɩ maa lɛ wʊ de ɛ, tɩchɛ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma lɛ wʊ de.”
38Ka a Jɔɔn 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Wiwile, sɩ nyɛ naa nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ mɩ na de a fʊ yuor na wʊ dire nɩ a sɩdɛbɛ ka a yire. Ka sɩ 'yɛr ɩka wʊ bar bojũu waa ɩ a sɩ ãsʊɔ ɛ.”
39Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ ta dii wʊ bar ɛ. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na de a n yuor tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ kʊ̃ 'yɛr ma 'yɛrdɛɛr go ɛ. 40Nɩrɛ jaa na ba jɛɛr nɩ sɩ ɛ, pʊɔ sɩ naa. 41Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na kʊ yɩ kɔ̃'maar nɩ ŋmele, yɩn ɩ a maa sofʊ jũu, a nɩnyɩnɛ kʊ̃ wa faa a wʊ sãyar ɛ.
42“Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa mɩ vɛ̃ naa a bʊ̃bil banyãna ãsʊɔ na sɔɔ ma ɩ yelbier, a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, bala 'mɔɔ nɩɛr lũ yɔɔl a wʊ nyĩe pɔ daa 'yɔ̃ɔ a man pɔ, ala sa. 43Ala ɩ a fʊ nũu vɛ̃ naa ka fʊ ɩ yelbier, ŋmaa bar. Fʊn tɩ kpɛ nyɛvʊr pɔ nɩ nũŋmaa sa naa fʊn tara a nuur a jaa ayi tɩ tɩ kpɛ a wõm jie a be a bũu na ba kpĩine ɛ. 45Ala ɩ a fʊ gbɛr mɩ vɛ̃ naa ka fʊ ɩ yelbier, ŋmaa bar fʊn tɩ kpɛ nyɛvʊr pɔ nɩ gbɛŋmaa sa naa fʊn tara a gbɛɛ a jaa ayi tɩ tɩ kpɛ a wõm jie. 47Ala ɩ a fʊ nɩbir mɩ vɛ̃ naa ka fʊ ɩ yelbier, 'loo bar. Fʊn tɩ kpɛ Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ nɩ nɩbifɩɛ sa naa fʊn tara a nɩbie ayi tɩ tɩ kpɛ a wõm jie. 48Be lɛ a ‘Bufulo ba kpire ɛ, ka a bũu mɩ ba kpĩine ɛ.’ (Isaiya 66:24) 49Dɔɔyɛ difʊ na lɩɛb nɩrɛ jaa nɩtãa lɛ nyaar na ma wõ bʊ̃diir ka a nʊ̃mɔ̃.
50“Nyaar ɩ naa, tɩchɛ a nʊ̃ɔ wa baar, ban lɛ bʊɔl wʊn nyaar ɔ? Yɩ ɩ nyaar, na yɩ tara nyã'maar kʊ taa.”

Title: MAAKƖ 10
Content:
1Yesu pãa yin a jie 'lɔ na wa chen a Judiya paal, na wʊ tɩ gɔ̃ɔ a Jordan man. Nɩyɔɔ lɛ wa naa a wʊ sɛ̃ go, ka wʊ wile ba nɩtãa a lɛ wʊn ma wile ba.
2A Faraseemɩne bamɩne wa naa ɩka ba wa bɛɛr wʊ kaa, na ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Sɔr ben be ka daba na tɔr a wʊ pɔɔ bar bɩɩ?”
3Ka a Yesu mɩ sʊʊr ba, “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a Mosesɩ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr?”
4Ka ba 'yɛr, “Mosesɩ bar sɔr ɩka daba wʊ sɛb dãasɩɛ gãn tɩ na wʊ tɔr a wʊ pɔɔ bar.”
5Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A yɩ nyãkpãɛn jũu lɛ so ka wʊ sɛb a lɛ. 6Tɩchɛ a wɛr pielfʊ, Nãaŋmɩn maal daba nɩ pɔɔ. (A Pielfʊ Gãn 1:27) 7A lɛ jũu, daba na bar a wʊ sãa nɩ a wʊ ma tɩchɛ ka 'lɔ nɩ a wʊ pɔɔ ɩ bʊ̃'yen, 8ka ba jaa ayi ɩ ãgãn bʊ̃'yen. (A Pielfʊ Gãn 2:24) Baa lɛ ɩ ayi ɛ, tɩ ɩ bʊ̃'yen. 9A lɛ jũu, bon 'lɔ jaa Nãaŋmɩn na 'mataa, nɩrɛ wʊ ta nyɔɔ wɛl ɛ.”
10Ban wa lɩɛb kul a yir, a Yesu poturbo sʊʊr wʊ naa a 'yɛr nyã go. 11Ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Daba jaa na tɔr wʊ pɔɔ bar tɩ kul pɔɔ yuo, wʊ maal yelbier. 12Lɛ mɩ lɛ, pɔɔ wa tɔr a wʊ sɩrɛ bar tɩ kul dayuo wʊ mɩ maal yelbier.”
13Nɩbɛ dɔ̃ɔ waara nɩ a ba bibiir ɩka Yesu wʊ dɔɔl ba a wʊ nũu, tɩchɛ ka a wʊ poturbo mii 'yɔ̃ɔ ba. 14Yesu na wa nyɛ a lɛ a wʊ poturbo na ɩ, wʊ nyɛn suur na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ bar a bibiir ka ba wa a n sɛ̃, na yɩ ta ŋmaa ba sɔr ɛ. A ba nyãna taaba lɛ so a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ. 15Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, nɩrɛ jaa na ba sɔɔ de a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ nɩtãa a bibile ɛ, wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ kpɛ be ɛ.” 16Be lɛ wʊ 'mɔɔr a bibiir, tɩ dɔɔl ba nuur na wʊ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ ba.
17Yesu na wa de a sɔr chiine, daba jon var gbur dumo a Yesu niem tɩ sʊʊr wʊ, “Wiwiilmãɛ, bo lɛ ɩn maal, naa nyɛ nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ?”
18Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ fʊ bʊɔl ma nɩmãɛ? Nɩrɛ jaa ba ɩ mãɛ ɛ, ka Nãaŋmɩn tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ. 19Fʊ bɔ̃ɔ naa a Nãaŋmɩn Nɛɛ. Taa kʊ nɩrɛ ɛ. Taa sɛ̃nɛ ɛ. Taa juro ɛ. Taa dire dãasɩjirɩ ɛ. Taa fɔlɔ ɛ. 'Yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a fʊ sãa nɩ a fʊ ma.” (A Yifʊ Gãn 20:12-16)
20Ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Wiwile, n bile sɔ̃ɔ jaa lɛ n turo a Nɛɛ anyãna wa tãn a dɩna.”
21Yesu kaa naa a daba nɩ nʊ̃fʊ, tɩ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “A chɛ fʊn yelbʊ̃'yen. Kul tɩ da a fʊ bonsɩ a jaa de põ nɔ̃n dẽme, ala lɛ fʊn tara bʊ̃mãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃. Tɩ na fʊ pãa wa turo ma.”
22A 'yɛr nyã vɛ̃ naa ka a daba sɔ̃ nie na wʊ kul pʊsɔ̃ɔ, bojũu tara sʊɔ lɛ wʊ ɩ.
23Be lɛ ka a Yesu kaa gʊɔr na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ poturbo, “A tara sʊɔ kpɛfʊ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ ɩn kpɛ̃ɔ!”
24A 'yɛrbie anyãna vɛ̃ naa ka ba nɛɛr 'maa, tɩchɛ ka wʊ lɛ 'yɛr go, “Bibiir, a ɩn kpɛ̃ɔ kʊ nɩrɛ jaa na na kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ! 25An ɩn kɔ̃mɔ̃kɔ̃mɔ̃, nyɔɔma na na kpɛ kparpĩi bɔɔ pɔ gar tara sʊɔ na na kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ.”
26Ka a poturbo pãa ɩ chĩcham, tɩ lɩɛb sʊrɔ taa, “An lɛ na pãa tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ faafʊ?”
27Ka a Yesu kaa ba tɩ 'yɛr, “Nɩrɛ sɛ̃ 'lɔ, a ɩn tuo, tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ba lɛ ɛ. Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ yele jaa ba ɩ tuo ɛ.”
28Be lɛ Pita 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Nyɛ, sɩn bar bon jaa tɩ wa turo fʊ!”
29Ka Yesu 'yɛr, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na bar a wʊ yir bɩɩ yɛɛr, bɩɩ yɛpɔbɔ bɩɩ a wʊ sãa bɩɩ a wʊ ma, bɩɩ bibiir bɩɩ wɛr, tɩ 'la maa nɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã jũu, 30wʊn nyɛn yɔɔ a dɩna. Wʊn nyɛn yie, yɛɛr, yɛpɔbɔ, mamɩne, bibiir nɩ wɛr dɔɔl gbɛɛ kɔbaa, nɩ a gefʊ! Tɩ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ na waara, ka wʊ nyɛ nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. 31Tɩchɛ a nɩyɔɔ bala na de nie na wa ben puor, ka a nɩyɔɔ bala na be a puor mɩ wa de a nie.”
32Ba dɔ̃ɔ de a sɔr duoro a Jerusalɛm ka Yesu de a nie, tɩ a wʊ poturbo nɛɛr 'maa ka bala mɩ na turo joro dãbãɛ. Wʊ tɔɔ naa a Pie Nɩ Ayi yin chɛ̃chɛ̃ 'yɛr kʊ ba a lɛn na wa a wʊ sɛ̃. 33Yesu 'yɛr naa, “Sɩn chiine a Jerusalɛm tẽe pɔ, be lɛ ban tɩ de a Nɩsaal Bie kʊ a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe, ka ba ɩka wʊ sɛɛn kũu, na ba nyɔɔ wʊ kʊ a nɩbɛ na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ. 34A banyãna na la wʊ naa, na ba chɩr nataar 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ, na ba fɔb wʊ tɩ kʊ wʊ. Ka a ber ata daar wʊn ir naa a kũu pɔ ɩ vʊr.”
35Be lɛ a Jebedee bibiir Jemesɩ nɩ Jɔɔn tɔɔ gbʊr a Yesu na ba 'yɛr, “Wiwile, sɩ bʊɔrɔ na ɩka sɩ sʊɔr fʊ yele kɔ̃ɔ ka fʊ maal kʊ sɩ.”
36Ka a Yesu sʊʊr ba, “Bãa lɛ yɩ bʊɔrɔ ɩka n maal kʊ yɩ?”
37Ka ba 'yɛr, “Vɛ̃ ka a sɩ ãsʊɔ jãnɛ a fʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ loor, ka 'yen mɩ jãnɛ a fʊ gʊba loor a fʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ.”
38Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yaa bɔ̃ɔ a bon yɩn sʊɔrɔ ɛ. Yɩn tʊ̃ɔ nyũn a dɔɔyɛ ŋmele 'lɔ ɩn wa nyũn, bɩɩ kpɛ a dɔɔyɛ 'lɔ pɔ ɩn wa kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ sofʊ kaar ɔ?”
39Ka a ba 'yɛr, “Ɔ̃ɔ.” Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Yɩn nyũn a ŋmele 'lɔ ɩn na nyũn, na yɩ so a kʊ̃ɔ 'lɔ ɩn na so, 40tɩchɛ a n nũsʊ̃ɔ loor nɩ a n gʊba loor 'lɔ n ba tara sɔr ɩka n kʊ yɩ ɛ. Nãaŋmɩn tɛɛ lɛ tara sɔr ɩka wʊ de a jiir anyãna kʊ a bala wʊn chɔɔr.”
41A poturbo pie bala na chɛ na wa wõ a yele, ba nyɛn suur 'yɔ̃ɔ a Jemesɩ nɩ a Jɔɔn. 42Ka a Yesu bʊɔl ba jaa 'mataa tɩ na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa a bala na ɩ a nãmɩne a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, ma fɩrɛ naa a nɩbɛ, ka a nɩbɛrɛ ma wile a ba kpãɛn. 43A ba ɩ lɛ lɛ a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ.
